34_8: Asi aunza manyepo pamusoro paAllah kana kuti mune kupenga maari? Kwete! Asi vasingatendi muhupenyu hwemangwana ndivo (pachavo) vari mumarwadzo, uye vakarasika zvakanyanya
34_9: Havaoni zviri mberi nemumashure mavo, zvedenga nepasi? Kana tikada, tinonyudza pasi navo, kana kuita kuti zvimedu zvedenga zvivadonhere. Zvirokwazvo, mune izvozvo mune chiratidzo kune wese muranda anotendeukira kuna Allah (achikumbira rugerero)
34_10: Uye zvirokwazvo, takave tinopa Dawood (Davhidha) nyasha kubva kwatiri (tichiti): “Imi makomo! Rumbidzai (Allah) naye! Uye imi shiri (zvekare)! Uye takaita kuti mhangura (simbi) imupfavire.”
34_11: Tichiti: “Zvigadzirisire mabhachi, uye enzanisa zvindove zvemadema utare engetani, uye moita (imi vanhu) zvakanaka. Zvirokwazvo, ndiri muoni wezvose zvamunoita.”
34_12: Uye Sulaimaan (Soromoni) takamupa mhepo, hungwanani hwayo hwaiva mwedzi (werwendo), uye usikati hwayo hwaiva mwedzi (werwendo). Uye takaita kuti dare (tsime) rendarira rimuerere, uye paiva nemaJinn aishanda pamberi pake nekuda kwaTenzi vake. Uye uyo kubva kwavari akatendeuka kubva kurairo yedu, tichaita kuti ave anoravira kuvirima kwemoto
34_13: Vaimushandira sekuda kwake, (vachivaka) makamuri marefu, zvivezwa, shambiro hombe sechengeto, uye mapoto mahombe akagadzikwa (pasi panzvimbo yavo). “Sevenzai, imi vemhuri yaDawood (Davhidha) mune kutenda!” Asi vashoma vevaranda vangu ndivo vanotenda
34_14: Apo takave tinozadzisa rufu rwake (Sulaimaan (Soromoni)), hapana chakavaudza (maJinn) nezverufu rwake kunze kwegore duku repasi iro rairamba (zvishoma nezvishoma) richidya tsvimbo yake. Saka apo akadonha, Majinn akanyatsoona kuti dai vaiva vaziva zvisingaoneki, vaiva vasingagari mumarwadzo anonyadzisa
34_15: Zvirokwazvo paiva kuna Sheba chiratidzo munzvimbo dzavaigara – mapindu maviri kudivi rerudyi uye nekuruboshwe, (zvikanzi kwavari): “Idyai pane zvamakapuwa naTenzi venyu, uye ivai munovatenda.” Pasi pakafanira uye naTenzi vanoregerera
34_16: Asi vakatendeukira kudivi, saka takatuma kwavari mapopoma, uye tikasandura mapindur avo maviri kuita mapindu emichero inovava, uye nemimwe michero, uye nemiti mishoma yelatosi
34_17: Naizvozvo takavapa mubairo nemhaka yokuti vaisatenda. Uye hatipe mubairo (wakadaro) kunze kweavo vasingatendi
34_18: Uye takagadzika, pakati pavo nemaguta atakaropafadza, maguta ari nyore kuoneka, uye tikaita kuti zvidimbu (zverwendo) pakati pavo zvive nyore (tichiti): “Fambai maari murugare manheru nemasikati.”
34_19: Asi vakati: “Tenzi vedu! Itai kuti zvidimbu zvekufamba kwedu pakati pedu zvirebe,” uye vakazvitadzira pachavo. Uye takavaita kuti vave sengano (panyika), uye tikavaparadzira vose zvachose. Zvirokwazvo, mazviri mune mucherechedzo kune wese anotsungirira, anotenda zvikuru
34_20: Uye zvirokwazvo Satani kufunga kwake kwakave chokwadi pamusoro pavo, uye vakamutevera, kunze kweboka revatendi
34_21: Uye iye (Satani) ange asina masimba pamusoro pavo, kunze kwekuti tive tinoedza uyo anotenda muhupenyu hwemangwana neuyo asingagutsikani nawo. Uye Tenzi vako vanoona zvose. (Vanonyora zviito zvemunhu wese, uye vachamupa mubairo unoenderana nazvo)
34_22: Taura (Muhammad (SAW)): “Shevedzai avo vamunoti (ndanamwari) kunze kwaAllah! Havana kana uremu hwekanhu kadiki kudenga kana pasi, uye havana mugove maari, uye Haana (Allah) kana mubatsiri kubva kwavari.”
34_23: Kumirirwa kwavari (Allah) hakubatsiri kunze kune uyo wavanobvumidza. Kusvikira apo kutya kukabviswa kubva madziri (ngirozi) muhana dzadzo, dzinoti (ngirozi): “Chii chataura Tenzi venyu?” Dzinoti: “Chokwadi. Uye ndivo vari pamusoro-soro, vakuru.”
34_24: Taura (Muhammad (SAW)): “Ndiyani anokupai raramo kubva kumatenga nepasi?” Iti: “Allah. Uye zvirokwazvo isu kana imi takatungamirirwa kana takarasika zviri pachena.”
34_25: Taura (Muhammad (SAW) kune vasingatendi): “Hamumbobvunzwi nemhaka yokutadza kwedu, uye hatimbobvunzwi pamusoro pezvamurikuita.”
34_26: Taura: “Tenzi vedu vachatiunganidza tose (pazuva rekutongwa), uye vachatonga pakati pedu nechokwadi. Uye ndivo mutongi anonyatsotonga, vanoziva zvose.”
34_27: Taura (Muhammad (SAW)): “Ndiratidzei avo murikuvabatanidza navo (Allah) sevabatsiri. Kwete (hapana vabatsiri)! Asi ndiAllah (chete) vane masimba ose, vane hungwaru hwose.”
34_28: Uye hatina kukutuma (Muhammad (SAW)) kunze kwekuve mupi wemashoko akanaka uye muyambiri kune vanhu vose, asi vanhu vakawanda havazvizivi
34_29: Uye vanoti: “Ndirinhi pachauya vimbiso iyi (zuva rekutongwa) kana uri pachokwadi?”
34_30: Taura (Muhammad (SAW)): “Vimbiso kwamuri ndeye zuva iro ramuchatadza kudzosera awa (nguva) kumashure kana kuendesa mberi.”
34_31: Uye avo vasingatendi vanoti: “Hatitendi muQur’aan iri kana mune izvo zvaiva mumashure maro.” Asi dai maiona apo vatadzi vachaitwa kuti vamire pamberi paTenzi vavo, vachitaudzana vachipomerana. Avo vange vakadzvanyirirwa vasina simba vachati kune avo vaizvitutumadza: “Dai pasina imi, zvirokwazvo, tingadai takave vatendi!”
34_32: Uye avo vaizvitutumadza vachati kune avo vange vakadzvanyirirwa: “Takakuvharidzirai kunhungamiri here payakauya kwamuri? Kwete, asi maiva vatadzi.”
34_33: Avo vainzi havana masimba (vaidzvanyirirwa) vachati kune avo vaizvitutumadza: “Kwete, asi kwaiva kuronga kwenyu husiku nesikati, apo makatikomekedza kusatenda muna Allah uye kuisa vamwe kwavari!” Uye vachaviga kudemba kwavo (nekusateerera kwavo Allah panyika) apo vachaona marwadzo. Uye tichaisa ngetani dzemhangura (simbi) kupoteredza huro dzeavo vaisatenda. Vachapuwa here mubairo kunze kweizvo vaiita
34_34: Uye hatina kutumira muyambiri kuguta asi avo vakapuwa hupfumi hwepanyika nekugarika pakati pavo vakati: “Hatitendi muizvo zvamatumwa nazvo.”
34_35: Uye vanoti: “Tine upfumi nevana vakawanda, uye hatizove tinopuwa mutongo.”
34_36: Taura (Muhammad (SAW)): “Zvirokwazvo, Tenzi vangu vanokudza raramo kune uyo wavanoda uye kuderedza, asi vanhu vakawanda havazvizivi.”
34_37: Uye hausi upfumi hwenyu, kana vana venyu vanokuunzai pedyo nesu, asi kunze kweuyo anotenda (muIslaam) nekuita mabasa akanaka. Vakadaro vachawana mubairo wakapetwa kaviri nezvavaiita, uye vachave vanogara munzvimbo dzapamusoro (Paradhiso) murunyararo
34_38: Uye avo vanoshanda nesimba kuda kuparadza zviratidzo zvedu nechinangwa chekuzvishingaidza, vachava vanounzwa kumarwadzo
34_39: Taura: “Zvirokwazvo, Tenzi vangu vanowedzera raramo kune uyo wavanoda kubva kune varanda vavo, uye kumuderedzera. Uye chero chamuchashandisa (munzira yaAllah kubva muhupfumi hwenyu), vanodzosera. Uye ndivo mupi anakanaka wepamusoro-soro weraramo.”
34_40: Uye zuva ravachavaunganidza wose, vachati kungirozi: “Ndimi here mainamatwa nevanhu ava?”
34_41: Dzichati (Ngirozi): “Kurumbidzwa ndekwenyu! Ndimi muchengeti wedu kusiya kwavo. Kwete, asi vainamata maJinn; vakawanda vavo vaiva vatendi maari.”
34_42: Saka zuva ranhasi mumwe wenyu hakwanisi kubatsira kana kukuvadza mumwe. Uye tichati kune avo vaiita zvakaipa (vainamata zvimwe zvinhu pamwechete naAllah): “Ravirai marwadzo emoto uyo wamairamba.”
34_43: Uye kana micherechedzo yedu iripachena ikaverengwa kwavari, vanoti: “Chii ichi kunze kwekuti murume (Muhammad (SAW)) anoda kukubvisai kubva kune izvo madzitateguru enyu ainamata.” Uye vanoti: “Iri (Qur’aan) hapana zviripo kunze kwemanyepo akafungwa.” Uye avo vasingatendi vanoti kana chokwadi chauya kwavari: “Hapana zviripo kunze kwemapipi ari pachena!”
34_44: Uye hatina kuvapa magwaro kuti vamadzidze, kana kutumira kwavari muyambiri mushure mako (Muhammad (SAW)
34_45: Uye vaiva mumashure mavo vakaramba, asi ava havana kumbowana kana kagumi kubva kune izvo zvatakavapa (vekare), asi vakaramba vatumwa vangu. Saka wakanga wakaoma sei murango wangu
34_46: Taura (Muhammad (SAW)) kuti: “Ndinokukurudzirai chinhu chimwe: kuti momira nechinangwa chekufadza Allah muri vaviri uye mumwe, uye mofungisisa. Hakuna kupenga kune umwe wenyu (Muhammad (SAW)). Anongova muyambiri kwamuri pamberi pemarwadzo akaomarara.”
34_47: Taura (Muhammad (SAW)) kuti: “Chero mubairo wandakakukumbirai ndewenyu. Mubairo wangu unobva kuna Allah bedzi, uye ndivo mupupuri pamusoro pezvinhu zvose.”
34_48: Taura (Muhammad (SAW)) kuti: “Zvirokwazvo, Tenzi vangu vanodzikisa chokwadi, muzivisisi wezvakavandika.”
34_49: Taura (Muhammad (SAW)) kuti: “Chokwadi (Qur’aan) chauya, uye manyepo (satani) haavaki chinhu uye haamutsi (chinhu).”
34_50: Taura: “Chero ndikarasika, ndinenge ndarasika ndoga. Asi ndikaramba ndakatungamirwa, imhaka yedudziro yaTenzi vangu kwandiri. Zvirokwazvo, ndivo munzwi wezvose, vari padyo (nezvinhu zvose).”
34_51: Asi dai waiona, apo vachave vatyitya pasina kwekutizira, uye vachabvutwa (vachabatwa) panzvimbo iri pedyo
34_52: Uye vachati (muhupenyu hwemangwana): “Tavakutenda (iyezvino),” asi vangagamuchira kutenda sei kunzvimbo iri kure kure (kwavasingakwanisi kudzoka kuhupenyu wepasi)
34_53: Zvirokwazvo, vakarega kutenda (muIslaam) mushure (pasi rino), uye vaiva nekufungidzira pamusoro pezvisingaoneki (Paradhiso, Gehena, Kumutswa, Vimbiso yaAllah vachiti zvese manyepo) kubva kunzvimbo iri kure
34_54: Uye chidziviriro chichaiswa pakati pavo neizvo zvavanoshuvira (Ruregerero nekutenda) sezvakaitwa mumashure nevanhu vakafanana navo. Zvirokwazvo, vaiva nekufungidzira nekusagutsikana kukuru
35_1: Kurumbidzwa nekutenda kwose ndekwaAllah, Musiki wematenga nenyika, vakaita ngirozi vatumwa vane mapapiro maviri, matatu kana mana. Vanowedzera mukusika zvavanoda. Zvirokwazvo, Allah vanokwanisa kuita zvose
35_2: Kubva mutsitsi Allah dzavanopa kuvanhu, hapana angazvidzivirira; uye dzavanodzivirira hapana angape mushure mezvo. Uye ndivo samasimba, vane hungwaru hwose
35_3: Imi vanhu! Rangarirai makomborero aAllah kwamuri! Pane here mumwe musiki kunze kwaAllah avo vanokupai kubva kudenga (mvura) uye nepasi? Laa ilaaha illaa Huwa (Hakuna umwe ane kodzero yekunamatwa kunze kwavo). Saka munotendeukirei (kubva kwavari)
35_4: Uye vakakuramba (Muhammad (SAW)), zvirokwazvo vamwe vatume vakarambwa mushure mako. Uye kuna Allah ndiko kunodzoserwa nyaya dzose
35_5: Imi vanhu! Zvirokwazvo, vimbiso yaAllah ndeyechokwadi. Saka musarega hupenyu huno huchikunyengedzai, uye mambo wevanyengedzi (satani) asakunyengedzei nezvaAllah
35_6: Zvirokwazvo, Satani imhandu kwamuri, saka mutorei semuvengi. Anoshevedza vateveri vake kuti vave vagari vemumariri emoto
35_7: Avo vasingatendi, chavo uchange uri mutongo wakaomarara; uye avo vanotenda (muhumwechete hwaAllah) zvekare voita mabasa akanaka, vachawana ruregerero uye nemubairo mukuru (Paradhiso)
35_8: Uyo mabasa ake akaipa anoshongedzwa aonekere kwaari seakanaka (akafanana here neuyo ari panzira yakatwasuka)? Zvirokwazvo, Allah vanosiya uyo wavanoda kuti apengereke, zvekare votungamira wavanoda. Usazviparadze (Muhammad (SAW)) kana kuzvigumbura nekuda kwavo. Zvirokwazvo, Allah vanoziva zvose zvavanoita
35_9: Uye ndiAllah vanotumira mhepo kuti isimudze makore.Tomaendesa kunzvimbo yakafa (yakaoma), nekuda kwavo tinobva tamutsa nzvimbo iyi mushure mekufa kwayo. Nekudaro kuchava kumutswa kwevafi (pazuva rekutongwa)
35_10: Kana mumwe munhu achida mukurumbira, ngaazive kuti mukurumbira wese ndewaAllah chete (Uye munhu anokwanisa kuwana mukurumbira chete kuburikidza nekuteerera Allah nekuvanamata). Mashoko akanaka anoenda kwavari, uye basa rakanaka zvakare anowasimudza (Mashoko akanaka haatambirwi naAllah kunze kwekuti achiteverwa nemabasa akanaka). Asi avo vanoronga kuita mabasa akaipa, vachange vaine mutongo wakaomarara. Uye urongwa wavo unopera (unoparara)
35_11: Uye Allah vakakusikai (Adam) kubva muvhu, uye kubva muNutfah (vana vaAdam kubva mumvura yababa naamai yakasangana), uye vakakuisai muhuviri (murume nemukadzi). Hapana mukadzi anozvitakura kana kuzvara mwana kusiya kwekuti ivo vanenge vachizviziva. Hapana kana munhu anowedzerwa kana kudimburirwa hupenyu kusara kwekuti zvinenge zvakanyorwa mugwaro. Zvirokwazvo, pamberi pavo Allah zvinhu zvidukusa (zvirinyore)
35_12: Uye makungwa maviri (mhando dzemvura dzirimo) hadzina kufanana. Imwe inonaka uye ichitapira pakunwa, uye imwe ichivava zvekare ichisvota kunwa. Uye kubva maari (Makungwa) munodya nyama yehove nyoro, uye munowana kubvamo zvipfekwa. Uyezve zvekare unoona ngarava dzichifamba imo mumvura, muchitsvaga zvimwe zvezvipo zvavo (Allah), uye kuti muve munotenda
35_13: Vanoita kuti usiku upinde muzuva (nguva inoshomeka usiku inowedzerwa kunguva yemasikati), uye voita kuti masikati apinde muhusiku (nguva inoshomeka yemasikati inowedzerwa kunguva yeusika). Ndivo zvekare vane masimba pamusoro pezuva nemwedzi, chimwe nechimwe chinofamba panguva yakatarwa. Ava ndiAllah, Tenzi venyu. Ndivo vane humambo. Uye avo vanomudavidzira vasiri ivo (Allah), havasi varidzi kana veganda remodzi yemadheti
35_14: Kunyange mukavashevedzera, havanzwi kana kudana kwenyu. Uye kunyangwe vakakunzwai havatombokwanisi kana kukupindurai (kukupai zvamurikuda). Uye pazuva rekumutswa vacharamba kuvanamata kwamaiita. Zvekare hapana achakuudza (Muhammad (SAW)) seavo anoziva zvose (Allah)
35_15: Imi vanhu! Imi ndimi munomirira rubatsiro rwaAllah. Asi Allah ndivo vane upfumi hwose, vanofanirwa kurumbidzwa
35_16: Ingadai vaida, vaikuparadzai mose uye vounza zvisikwa zvitsva
35_17: Izvi hazvina kana kumbooma kuna Allah
35_18: Uye hapana kana munhu achatakura mikwende yemumwe. Uye kana ane mikwende akasheedzera kuti itakurwe, hapana chichatakurwa kubva kwairi, kunyangwe ari munhu wepedyo. Zvirokwazvo, unokwanisa (Muhammad (SAW)) kuyambira avo vanotya Tenzi vavo vasingaoneki uye voita Swalaah. Uye uyo anozvichenura (kubva kuzvitadzo), anenge achizvichenura nekuzvibatsira pachake. Uye zvirokwazvo kuna Allah ndiko kwatichadzokera
35_22: Uye havana kuenzana vapenyu (vatendi) nevafi (vasingatendi). Zvirokwazvo, Allah vanoita kuti wavanoda anzwe, asi iwe haukwanise kuita kuti vari mumakuva vanzwe
35_23: Unongove (iwe Muhammad (SAW)) muyambiri (Basa rako kungosvitsa shoko chete, asi kutambirwa kwaro kuri mumaoko aAllah)
35_24: Zvirokwazvo, takava tinokutumidzira nechokwadi, mupi wenhaurwa tsvene uye uri muyambiri. Zvekare hapana kana chikwata (chevanhu) asi kusara kwekuti muyambiri akapfuura nemavaiva vari
35_25: Uye vakaramba (kukuteerera) iwe, vainge varipo mushure mavo vakarambawo zvekare. Vatumwa vavo vakauya kwavari nezviratidzo zviri pachena, uye nemagwaro, pamwe negwaro rinopa chiedza
35_26: Uye ndakave ndinotora (ndinoranga) avo vasingatendi. Uye mutongo wangu wange wakaoma sei
35_27: Ko hauoni here kuti Allah vanotumira mvura kubva kumatenga. Uye toburitsa nayo michero yemhando dzakasiyana-siyana, uye kubva mumakomo mune mhando chena netsvuku dzemivara yakasiyana-siyana uye (dzimwe) dzakanyanyo svibira
35_28: Uye kubva muvanhu nemhuka nemombe mune mavara akasiyana-siyana zvekare. Zvirokwazvo, ndeavo chete vane ruzivo kubva pavaranda vavo vanotya Allah. Zvirokwazvo, Allah vane masimba, uye vanoregerera zvikuru
35_29: Zvirokwazvo, avo vanoverenga Gwaro raAllah (Qur’aan), uye voita Swalaah (vonamata), vopa (zvipo) kubva kune zvatakavapa muchivande kana pachena, vanotarisira mubairo uyo usingambopera
35_30: Kuti vachavaripa mibairo yavo zvizere, uye vovawedzera kubva munyasha dzavo. Zvirokwazvo, ndivo vanoregerera, vanoyemura (mabasa akanaka)
35_31: Uye zvatadzikisa kwauri (Muhammad (SAW)) muGwaro (Qur’aan) ndezvechokwadi (kuti uzvitevedzere iwe nevatevedzeri vako), uye zvichitsigira izvo (zvakadzikiswa) zviri mumashure maro. Zvirokwazvo, Allah vanoziva uye vanoona zvose zviri muvaranda vavo
35_32: Uye takave tinopa Gwaro (Qur’aan) senhaka kuvaranda vedu kubva kune avo vatakasarudza (vatevedzeri vaMuhammad (SAW)). Uye kubva mavari mune vanozvikanganisira, zvekare kubva mavari mune vanotevedzera nzira iri pakati nepakati, uye kubva pavari pane vamwe vari pakuita kunyanya mabasa akanaka nekuda kwaAllah. Iyi (nhaka yeQur’aan) inhaka svinu chaiyo (inyasha huru)
35_33: Paradhiso vacharipindamo, uye vachapfekedzwa fumba dzegoridhe (mabhenguru) nemapera, uye mbatya dzavo dzichange dziri dzesiriki
35_34: Uye vachataura kuti: “Kurumbidzwa nekutendwa kose ngakuve kuna Allah vatibvisira matambudziko ose. Zvirokwazvo, Tenzi vedu vanoregerera, vanoyemura (mabasa akanaka uye kupa mubairo).”
35_35: “Avo, kubva paNyasha dzavo, vatigarisa isu munzvimbo yatichagara zvachose, umo musina kana dambudziko rinotiwana, kana kuneta.”
35_36: Asi avo vasingatendi (muhumwechete hwaAllah), vachawana moto weGehena, uko havasi kuzombourayiwa kana mutongo wavo kumbodzorwa. Kudaro tinopa mubairo kune wese asingatendi
35_37: Umo vachachema: “Tenzi wedu! Tiburitseiwo, tichaita mabasa akanaka kwete ayo ataiita.” (Allah vachapindura vachiti): “Hatina here kukupai hupenyu hwakakwana, kuitira kuti uyo anenge atambira chenjedzo obva aitambira? Uye muyambiri akauya kwamuri. Saka ravirai (huipi hwemabasa enyu). Kune vaiti vezvakashata hapana mubatsiri.”
35_38: Zvirokwazvo, Allah vanoziva zvakavandika mumatenga nepanyika. Chokwadi, vanoziva zvose zviri mumoyo
35_39: Ndivo vakakuitai vamiririri muri zvikwata mushure mezvikwata panyika, kuitira kuti uyo asingatendi (muIslaam) kunenge kuri kusatenda kwake. Uye kusatenda kwevasingatendi hakuna chakunowedzera kusara kweruvengo rwaTenzi vavo. Uye kusatenda kwevasingatendi hakuna kana zvakunowedzera kusara kwekurasikirwa
35_40: Taura (iwe Muhammad (SAW)): “Ndiudzei zvamunofunga maererano nezvamunodaidza kuti vanamwari kunze kwaAllah? Ndiratidzei kunyangwe chavakasika pano panyika. Kana kuti vane here kunyangwe chidimbu kumatenga? Kana kuti takavapa Gwaro kuti vakwanise kuzotevedzera hwapupu huri mariri? Vaiti vezvakaipa havavimbisani kusara kwenyengedzo.”
35_41: Zvirokwazvo, Allah vakapfumbata matenga nenyika kuitira kuti zvisafambe-fambe kubva panzvimbo yazvo, uye kana akafamba kubva panzvimbo yavo, hapana anokwanisa kumapfumbata mushure mavo. Muchokwadi, Allah vane moyo murefu, uye vanoregerera zvikuru
35_42: Uye vakapika naAllah mundudziro dzavo kuti kana muyambiri akauya kwavari, vachange vari vakatungamirirwa zvakanyanya kupinda avo vaivapo. Apo muyambiri (Muhammad (SAW)) paakauya kwavari, hapana kana chakawedzera pavari kusara kwekumhanyidzana (kubva pachokwadi)
35_43: (Vakamhanyidzana mukutiza nekuda kwe) Kusanzwisisa kwavo panyika uye kuipa kwehurongwa hwavo. Asi huipi hwehurongwa ndewe uyo anenge ahuronga. Uye vanotarisira here (chimwe) chinhu kusara kweSunnah (nzira) yevanhu vekare? Saka hapana kana shanduko paSunnah (Nzira) yaAllah yauchawana. Uye hapana kana kudzokera shure kuchaitika paSunnah (Nzira) yaAllah
35_44: Havana here kufamba panyika vakaona magumo eavo vaive mumashure mavo kunyangwe zvavo vaiva nemasimba akawanda kupinda avo? Allah havasi vekuti chii zvacho chiri mumatenga nenyika chingakwanisa kuvatiza. Chokwadi, Allah vanoziva zvese, uye vane masimba pamusoro pezvinhu zvose
35_45: Uye ingadai Allah vakada kurwadzisa (kuranga) vanhu zvichienderana nemabasa avo, vaisambosiya kana chii zvacho chinorarama pano panyika. Asi vanovaregerera (vanovasiya) kusvikira nguva yakatarwa yasvika. Uye kana nguva yavo ichinge yasvika, zvirokwazvo Allah vanoona zvizere varanda vavo
36_1: Yaa – Seen. (Aya mavara mamwe ezvishamiso zveQur’aan, uye hapana anoziva zvaanoreva kusara kwaAllah)
36_5: (Iyi ibvundunuro) yakatumirwa pasi naSamasimba, vane nyasha zhinji
36_6: Kuti ukwanise kuyambira vanhu avo madzibaba avo haana kunge akayambirwa, nokudaro havateereri (havana hanya)
36_7: Zvirokwazvo, shoko (remutongo) rabuda pachena richipokana nevazhinji vavo, saka havasi kuzombotenda
36_8: Zvirokwazvo, tavatakudza changadzo muhuro dzavo kusvikira muzvirebvu, muzvirokwazvo kuitira kuti misoro yavo irambe yakasimudzwa mudenga
36_9: Uye takave tinoisa muganhu mumashure mavo uye takaisa muganhu pakati pavo, uye takavaputira kuitira kuti vasaone
36_10: Zvakangofanana kwavari, kuti unovayambira kana kusayambira, havambotendi
36_11: Unokwanisa kungoyambira uyo anotevedzera yambiro (Qur’aan), uye achitya vane nyasha zhinji (Allah) vasingaoneki. Ipa uyo nhaurwa tsvene dzerugerero uye mubairo wakanaka (Paradhiso)
36_12: Zvirokwazvo, tinopa hupenyu kune vakafa, uye tinonyora izvo zvavanotumira kumberi (kwavo), uye nemastsimba avo, uye zvinhu zvose takazvinyora zviri mumanhamba mubhuku riri pachena
36_13: Vataurire maererano nemuenzaniso wenyaya yevagari vedhorobha (Antioch (Antakiya)), apo pakauya vatumwa kwavari
36_14: Patakavatumira vatumwa vaviri, vakavaramba. Saka takavasimbisa newechitatu, uye vakati: “Chokwadi, tave tinotumwa kwamuri sevatumwa.”
36_15: Ivo (vanhu vedhorobha) vakati: “Muri vanhu sesu, uye vane nyasha zhinji (Allah) hapana chavadzikisa. Muri kutaura manyepo.”
36_16: Vatumwa vakati: “Tenzi vedu vanoziva kuti tave tinotumwa sevatumwa kwamuri.”
36_17: “Uye basa redu ndere kungosvitsa shoko zviri pachena.”
36_18: Ivo (vanhu) vakati: “Isu tiri kuona chiitiko chakaipa (munyama) kubva kwamuri. Mukasasiya, tinoku temai-temai nematombo zvechokwadi, uye marwadzo akaomarara anokuwanai kubva kwatiri.”
36_19: (Ivo vatumwa) vakati: “(Munyama) Zviitiko zvenyu zvakaipa zvinemi! (Munochishevedza kuti “chiitiko chakaipa (munyama)”) nekuti murikueuchidzwa? Asi muri vanhu vanotyora mirairo yaAllah (muchiita mhando dzose dzezvitadzo zvikuru uye nekusateerera Allah).”
36_20: Uye pakauya murume achimhanya kubva kunzvimbo yaiva kure yedhorobha akati: “Imi vanhu vangu! Teererai vatumwa.”
36_21: “Tevedzerai avo vasingambo kubvunzai maererano nemubhadharo wavo, uye vakatungamirirwa (munzira yakatwasuka).”
36_22: “Uye ndingazotadza sei kunamata avo vakandisika uye kwavari muchava munodzoserwa?”
36_23: “Ndingatora here zvinamatwa kunze kwavo? Kana vane nyasha zhinji (Allah) vakandishuvira chakaipa, kumiririra kwazvo (zvinamatwa kunze kwaAllah) hakukwanisi kundibatsira, uye hazvikwanisi kundinunura?”
36_25: “Zvirokwazvo, ndave ndinotenda muna Tenzi venyu, naizvozvo nditeererei!”
36_26: Zvakanzi (kwaari apo paakauraiwa nevasingatendi): “Pinda Paradhiso.” Akati: “Ndinoshuvira kuti dai vanhu vangu vaziva.”
36_27: “Kuti Tenzi vangu (Allah) vandiregerera, uye vakandiita umwe wevakaremekedzwa!”
36_28: Uye hatina kuva tinotumira kuvanhu vake mushure make mauto kubva kudenga, uye pange pasina chikonzero chekuti titumire
36_29: Kwakangova kudaidzira (Swaihah) kumwechete uye vakabva vanyaradzwa (vafa)
36_30: Matambudziko kuvanhu (varanda vaAllah)! Hakuna kuva kunouya mutumwa kwavari kusara kwekuti vaimutuka (vaimutsvinyira)
36_31: Havaoni here kuti madzinza mangani atakaparadza mushure mavo? Zvirokwazvo, havazombofa vakadzokera kwavari
36_32: Uye zvirokwazvo, vose umwe neumwe wavo achava anounzwa kwatiri
36_33: Uye chiratidzo kwavari, inyika inenge isina upenyu. Tinoipa upenyu, uye tinoburitsa kubva mairi zvirimwa (mbesa), kuti vave vanodya kubva madziri
36_34: Uye tinogadzira mairi (nyika) mapindu emadheti nemagirepi, uye tinokonzera kuti zvitubu zvemvura zvive zvinobuda mairi (nyika)
36_35: Kuti vave vanodya kubva kumichero yawo, uye maoko avo haasi anozvigadzira. Saka sei vasingapi kutenda
36_36: Kurumbidzwa ngakuve kune avo vakasika zvinhu (zvisikwa) zvose muuviri kubva kune izvo zvinoburitswa nepasi, uye kubva kwavari (vanhu, varume nevakadzi), uye kubva kune izvo zvavasingazivi
36_37: Uye chiratidzo kwavari ndecheusiku. Tinobvisa kubva mahuri (husiku) masikati, uye ngwarirai, vanenge vave murima
36_38: Uye	zuva	rinofamba	nemunzira	yaro	kwenguva	yarakatarirwa.	Uku	ndiko	kuronga kwaSamasimba, vane ruzivo rwose
36_39: Uye mwedzi takava tinoutarira nzira yawo (yekufamba nayo) kusvikira wadzoka kwatiri sedzinde rekare remaDheti rakaminama, rakaoma
36_40: Hazvikwanisike kuti zuva ridarikire mwedzi kana kuti usiku udarikire masikati. Zvose zvinofamba mudenga zvichitenderera
36_41: Uye chiratidzo kwavari ndechekuti takatakura zvizvarwa zvavo mungarava yakatakura (yaNowa)
36_42: Uye takava tinovasikira zvakafanana nayo (ngarava) izvo zvavanotasva
36_43: Uye kana tichida, tichavanyudza uye pachange pasina anodeedzera (kana mununuri achanzwa kuchema kwavo), uye havazombonunurwi
36_44: Kusara kwekuti dziri tsitsi kubva kwatiri, uye semafaro kwekanguva
36_45: Uye zvikanzi kwavari: “Ityai izvo zviri pamberi penyu (marwadzo epanyika), uye neizvo zviri pamberi penyu zvamusingaoni (marwadzo emuhupenyu hunotevera), kuti muve munogashira tsitsi (kana mukatambira Islaam).”
36_46: Uye hakuna chiratidzo kubva muzviratidzo zvaTenzi vavo chakauya kwavari kusara kwekuti vakachifuratira
36_47: Uye pazvinonzi kwavari: “Ipai kubva mune izvo zvamakapihwa naAllah,” avo vasingatendi vanoti kune avo vanotenda: “Tingape kudya avo, dai Allah vaida, ivo (Allah pachezvavo) vaivapa chikafu? Zvirokwazvo, makarasika zviri pachena.”
36_48: Uye vanoti: “Chitsidzo ichi (zuva rekutongwa) chichazadzikiswa rinhi kana muri muchokwadi?”
36_49: Havana kumirira kusara kweSwaihah (kudeedzera) kumwe kuchavaparadza vari pakati pekupikisana
36_50: Naizvozvo havasi kuzokwanisa kutaura zvido zvavo mushure mavo (vafa), kana kudzokera kumhuri dzavo
36_51: Uye hwamanda icharidzwa (kuridzwa kwepiri), uye naizvozvo vachabuda mumarinda avo vakananga kuna Tenzi vavo nokukurumidza
36_52: Vachati: “Matambudziko kwatiri! Ndiani atimutsa kubva munzvimbo yedu yekurara?” (Zvichanzi kwavari): “Izvi ndizvo zvakavimbiswa neavo vane tsitsi dzose (Allah), uye vatumwa vakava vanotaura chokwadi!”
36_53: Kuchangove kusheedzera kumwe, naizvozvo vose vachava vanounzwa pamberi pedu
36_54: Zuva iri (rekutongwa) hapana achakanganisirwa pane chimwe chinhu, uye hamusi kuzopihwa chinhu kusara kweizvo zvamaiita
36_55: Zvirokwazvo, vagari vemuParadhiso, muzuva iri, vanenge vari mubishi nezvinhu zvinofadza
36_56: Ivo nevakadzi vavo vachange vari mumimvuri, vakatsamhira muzvigaro (zveumambo)
36_57: Vachave nemichero (yendudzi dzose) imomo uye nezvose zvavanokumbira
36_58: (Zvichanzi kwavari): “Salaam (rugare ngaruve kwamuri) – shoko kubva kuna Tenzi (Allah), vane tsitsi dzose
36_59: (Zvichanzi): “Uye Imi maMujrimoon (vatadzi)! Patsanukai muzuva ranhasi (kubva kuvatendi).”
36_60: “Handina kukuudzai, imi vana vaAdam, kuti musave munonamata Shaitwaan (Satani). Zvirokwazvo, muvengi ari pachena kwamuri.”
36_61: “Uye kuti muve munondinamata. Iri ndiro gwara rakatwasuka.”
36_62: “Uye zvirokwazvo iye (Satani) akava anorasisa vakawanda venyu. Hamuna kunzwisisa here?”
36_64: “Itsvai mariri muzuva ranhasi, nokuda kweizvo zvamaisatenda.”
36_65: Nhasi, tichavhara miromo yavo, uye maoko avo achataura nesu, uye makumbo avo achapa uchapupu pamusoro peizvo zvavaiwana. (Zvinonzi chidya cheruboshwe ndicho chichatanga kupa uchapupu)
36_66: Uye dai kwaiva kuda kwedu, tingadai zvirokwazvo takadzima maziso avo, kuti vave vanotambudzika panzira. Vaizoona sei
36_67: Uye dai kwaiva kuda kwedu, tingadai takavashandura (kuti vave mhuka kana zvimwe zvisikwa zvisingafemi) panzvimbo dzavo. Naizvozvo vaisakwanisa kuenda mberi kana kudzokera kumashure
36_68: Uye uyo watinopa hupenyu hwakareba, tinomudzosera kuhusikwa (kushaya simba mushure mokuva nesimba). Hamunzwisisi here
36_69: Uye hatina kumudzidzisa (Muhammad (SAW)) nhetembo, uye hadzina kukodzera kwaari. Iyi ingori yeuchidzo neQur’aan riri pachena
36_70: Kuti rive (Qur’aan) rinochenjedza uyo ari kurarama (mutendi), uye kuti rigova shoko rechokwadi kune avo vasingatendi (vakafa nekusatenda kwavo)
36_71: Havaoni here kuti takavasikira mombe nemaoko edu kuti vave varidzi vadzo
36_72: Uye takaita kuti dzive (mombe) pasi pavo, kuti dzimwe dzacho vave vanotatswa uye dzimwe dzacho vadye
36_73: Uye vane zvakanaka zvavanowana kubva madziri, uye vanowana mukaka kuti vanwe. Sei vasingatendi
36_74: Uye vakatora zvimwe zvisikwa kunze kwaAllah saanamwari vachitarisira kuti vangabatsirwa (nezvinanamwari zvavo)
36_75: Havambokwanisi kuvabatsira, asi vachazounzwa pamberi semauto vachipikisana nevaivanamata (pazuva rekutongwa)
36_76: Naizvozvo mashoko avo ngaasave anokusuwisa (Muhammad (SAW)). Zvirokwazvo, tinoziva zvavanoviga nezvavanobuditsa pachena
36_77: Munhu haaoni here kuti takamusika kubva muNutfah (Mvura yemurume nemukadzi yakasangana)? Asi zvirokwazvo anomira semupikisi ari pachena
36_78: Uye anoisa muenzaniso pamusoro pedu, uye wobva akanganwa kusikwa kwake, achibva ati: “Ndiani achapa hupenyu kumapfupa mushure mekunge aora uye aita mavhu?”
36_79: Iti (Muhammad (SAW)): “Achapihwa hupenyu (mapfupa) neavo vakaasika pekutanga! Uye vane ruzivo pamusoro pezvisikwa zvose!”
36_80: “Avo vanokubuditsirai moto kubva kumuti munyoro, apo pamunenge mave kubatidza kubva kwauri.”
36_81: Avo vakasika matenga nenyika havana here simba rekusika zvimwe zvakafanana naizvozvo? Hongu, zvirokwazvo ndivo musiki mukuru vane ruzivo
36_82: Zvirokwazvo, mutemo wavo kana vada chinhu vanongoti: “Ivapo!” – chobva chavapo
36_83: Naizvozvo kurumbidzwa ngakuve kwavari, avo muruoko rwavo mune humambo hwezvinhu zvose, uye kwavari muchadzoserwa
37_3: Neavo (ngirozi) vanosvitsa mashoko kuvanhu kubva kuna Allah
37_5: Tenzi vematenga nenyika neizvo zviri pakati pazvo uye Tenzi vemabvazuva
37_6: Zvirokwazvo, takava tinoshongedza denga repadyo neshongedzo yenyenyedzi
37_7: Uye sechidziviriro kubva kumweya yose yadhiyabhorosi yakapanduka
37_8: Havakwanisi kuteerera kune gungano riri pamusoro (ngirozi) nokuda kwekuti vanotemwa kubva kumativi ose
37_9: Vakarasirirwa, uye vachava nemutongo unorwadza usingaperi
37_10: Kusara kweuyo anotora (anobvuta) chimwe chinhu mushure mekunge aba, uye oteverwa nemarimi emoto anovheneka
37_11: Naizvozvo (Muhammad (SAW)) vabvunze (vasingatendi): “Ndivo here vakaoma kusika, kana kuti ndeizvo zvatakasika (matenga nenyika nemakomo)?” Zvirokwazvo, takavasika kubva muivhu rinonamira (matope)
37_12: Asi unoshamiswa (Muhammad (SAW)) apo ivo vachituka (vachitsvinyira) (iwe pamwe neQur’aan)
37_14: Uye kana vachinge vaona chiratidzo (kubva kuna Allah) vanochitsvinya
37_15: Uye vanoti: “Hapana zviripo kusara kwemapipi ari pachena!”
37_16: “Kana tichinge tafa tave huruva nemapfupa, zvirokwazvo tichamutswa here?”
37_19: Kuchangova kudeedzera kumwechete (Zajrah – kuridzwa kwehwamanda kechipiri), uye ngwarirai, vachange vakayeva (vakatarisa)
37_20: Vachati: “Matambudziko kwatiri! Iri ndiro zuva rekutongwa (remugove)!”
37_22: (Zvichanzi kungirozi): “Unganidzai avo vaiita zvisakarurama, pamwechete nevaigara navo (vanadiyabhorosi) uye neizvo zvavainamata.”
37_25: “Dambudziko renyu nderei? Sei musiri kubatsirana (sezvamaisiita panyika)?”
37_26: Asi zuva iroro vachazvipira (Vachakanda mapfumo pasi)
37_28: Vachati: “Zvirokwazvo, ndimi maiuya kwatiri kubva kurudyi (muchitikurudzira kusatenda nekuita mabasa akaipa).”
37_29: Vachati (Vadzvanyiriri): “Asi imi pachenyu makange musiri vatendi.”
37_30: “Uye takanga tisina masimba pamusoro penyu. Asi makange muri vanhu vaisatenda (vaipfurikidza mwero).”
37_31: “Saka izwi raTenzi vedu rava rinonangana nesu kuti zvirokwazvo tichava tinoravira (mutongo wakaomarara).”
37_32: “Uye takakutungamirai kugwara rakarasika nokuda kwekuti isu pachedu takanga takarasika.”
37_33: Uye zvirokwazvo zuva iroro vachava vese vanowana marwadzo
37_35: Zvirokwazvo, pazvakanzi kwavari: “Laa ilaaha illallaah (Hakuna umwe mwari anofanirwa kunamatwa kunze kwaAllah),” vakazvitutumadza
37_36: Uye vakati: “Tingasiye vanamwari vedu here nokuda kwemudetembi asina kukwana?”
37_37: Asi iye (Muhammad (SAW)) auya nechokwadi (Islaam) uye achisimbisa (achitsigira) vatumwa (vaivepo iye asati avepo)
37_39: Uye hamusi kuzopihwa chimwe chinhu kusara kweizvo zvamaiita
37_45: Mukombe wewaini yakanaka uchitenderedzwa pakati pavo
37_47: Havasi kuzovhiringidzwa (kurwadziwa) nayo, kana kuti kudhakwa nayo
37_48: Uye parutivi pavo pachange paine vakadzi vanodzora maziso avo (vasingadi vamwe kunze kwevarume vavo), vane maziso mahombe akanaka
37_51: Mutauri pakati pavo achiti: “Zvirokwazvo, ndaive neshamwari (Panyika).”
37_52: “Aitaura kuti: ‘Uri pakati peavo vanotenda (muhupenyu hunotevera here).’
37_53: ‘(Kuti) Kana tichinge tafa tova huruva nemapfupa, tichava tinomutswa kuti tinowana mubairo kana murango (zvichienderanda nemabasa edu)?’”
37_55: Naizvozvo akatarisa pasi uye akamuona ari pakati pemoto
37_57: “Dai dzisiri nyasha dzaTenzi vangu, ndingadai ndiri mumwe weavo varimo (mumoto).”
37_59: “Kusara kwekufa kwedu kwekutanga, uye hatisi kuzopihwa murango (mushure mekupinda muParadhiso)?”
37_62: Ndiwo magariro ari nani here (Paradhiso) kana kuti muti weZaqqoom (muti unovava zvekuti wekumoto)
37_63: Zvechokwadi, takaugadzira semuedzo kune avo vasingatendi (vatadzi)
37_64: Zvirokwazvo, imuti unobuda kubva pasi pemoto
37_65: Kupukira kwemadzinde emichero yacho kunenge misoro yemaShayaatween (ana Dhiyabhorosi)
37_66: Zvechokwadi, vachadya kubva mauri uye matumbu avo achazadzwa nawo
37_67: Uye pamusoro pazvo vachapihwa mvura inopisa kuti vanwe kuti ive musanganiswa (wemvura inopisa neZaqqoom)
37_68: Uye mushure mazvo, zvirokwazvo, vachadzokera mumarimi emoto
37_69: Zvirokwazvo, vakawana madzibaba avo ari mugwara rakarasika
37_71: Uye zvirokwazvo vazhinji vakave vakarasika ivo vasati vavapo
37_72: Uye zvirokwazvo takava tinotumira vayambiri pakati pavo (vatumwa)
37_73: Naizvozvo tarisai magumo eavo vakayambirwa (asi havana kuteerera)
37_75: Uye zvirokwazvo Nowa akatisheedza, uye ndisu tiri pamusoro peavo vanopa mhinduro
37_76: Uye takamununura pamwechete nemhuri yake kubva kumarwadzo makuru (kunyura)
37_77: Uye takaita kuti vana vake (Shem, Ham naJapheth) vave vanorarama
37_78: Uye takava tinomusiira (kurangarira kwakanaka) pakati pemarudzi aizouya
37_79: “Rugare (kubva kwatiri) ngaruve kuna Nowa pasi rose!”
37_80: Zvirokwazvo, ndiwo mubairo watinopa maMuhsinoon (vanhu vanoita mabasa akanaka)
37_81: Zvirokwazvo, (Nowa) akanga ari umwe wevaranda vedu vaitenda
37_83: Uye zvirokwazvo pakati pevakatevera nzira yake (Nowa) aiva Ibrahim (Abrahamu)
37_84: Apo paakauya kuna Tenzi vake nemoyo wakachena
37_85: Apo paakati kuna baba vake nevanhu vake: “Chii chamunonamata?”
37_86: “Ndivana mwari venhema here vamunoda muchisiya Allah?”
37_89: Uye akati: “Zvirokwazvo, ndiri kurwara. (Akaita izvi kuti asaende kemhemberero dzavo kuti asare achiparadza zvidhori zvavainamata).”
37_91: Uye akabva atendeukira kunanamwari vavo achibva ati: “Hamudyi here (chikafu chirimberi kwenyu)?”
37_93: Uye akabva atendeukira kwazviri achizvirova neruoko (rwake) rwerudyi
37_98: Naizvozvo vakamurongera zano asi takavaita kuti vave vepasi pasi
37_99: Uye akati (Anunurwa kubva mumoto): “Zvirokwazvo, ndavakuenda kuna Tenzi vangu. Vachanditungamirira!”
37_100: “Tenzi vangu! Ndipeiwo vana vanoita mabasa akanaka.”
37_101: Naizvozvo takamupa shoko rakanaka remukomana akashinga
37_102: Uye paakanga akura (mwana wake) zvekukwanisa kufamba naye, (Ibrahim (Abrahamu)) akati: “Iwe mwana wangu! Zvirokwazvo, ndaona kuhope ndichikucheka (sechipiro kuna Allah). Naizvozvo unozviona sei?” Akati: “Imi baba vangu! Itai zvamaudzwa, kana Allah vachida, muchandiwana ndiri pakati peavo vanotsungirira.”
37_103: Uye apo vose vakanga vazvipira pachezvavo (kuna Allah), uye akanga amuradzika akatarisa pasi
37_105: “Zvirokwazvo, wava unozadzisa hope (dzako)!” Zvirokwazvo, ndiwo mubairo watinopa maMuhsinoon (vanhu vanoita mabasa akanaka)
37_108: Uye takava tinomusiira (kurangarira kwakanaka) pakati pemarudzi aizouya
37_110: Saizvozvo tinopa mubairo maMuhsinoon (vanhu vanoita mabasa akanaka)
37_111: Zvirokwazvo, akanga ari umwe wevaranda vedu vaitenda
37_112: Uye takamupa shoko rakanaka raIshaaq (Isaka), muporofita kubva kune vanhu vanoita mabasa akanaka
37_113: Takava tinomukomborera naIshaaq (Isaka). Uye kubva muvana vavo pane vamwe vaiita mabasa akanaka, nevamwe vaizvidzvanyirira zviri pachena pachezvavo
37_115: Takava tinovanunura pamwechete nevanhu vavo kubva kudambudziko guru
37_121: Zvirokwazvo, ndiwo mapiro atinoita mugove kune vanoita mabasa akanaka
37_122: Zvirokwazvo, vari vaviri (Musa naHaroon (Aroni)) vakanga vari vamwe vevaranda vedu vanotenda
37_123: Uye zvirokwazvo Elyaas (Eriya) akanga ari umwe wevatumwa
37_125: “Mungadaidza Ba’l (chiumbwa chaizivikanwa chavainamata) muchisiya musiki wepamusoro soro.”
37_126: “Allah, Tenzi venyu, uye Tenzi vemadzibaba (madzitateguru) enyu ekutanga.”
37_127: Asi vakamuramba (Elyaas (Eriya)), saka naizvozvo vachava vanounzwa (kumutongo)
37_131: Zvirokwazvo, ndiwo mapiro atinoita mugove kune avo vanoita mabasa akanaka
37_132: Zvirokwazvo, akanga ari umwe wevaranda vedu vanotenda
37_133: Uye zvirokwazvo Loti akanga ari umwe wevatumwa
37_135: Kusara kwechembere (mudzimai wake) yakava pane vakasara kumashure
37_136: Uye takava tinoparadza vamwe vose (Guta reSodom kuPalestine)
37_139: Uye zvirokwazvo, Yunus (Jonah) akange ari umwe wevatumwa
37_141: Uye akava (anobvumirana) nekutsvaga mhanza, uye akava anokundwa
37_142: Uye akamedzwa nehove (hombe) sezvo iye aiva nemhosva
37_143: Dai kusiri kuti akanga ari mumwe wevairumbidza Allah
37_144: Angadai akaramba ari mudumbu mayo (hove) kusvikira zuva rekupedzisira (rekumutswa)
37_145: Asi takava tinomukanda kumahombe kombe ava kurwara
37_146: Takava tinoita kuti munhanga umere pamusoro pake
37_147: Uye takamutumira kuzviuru zana (zvevanhu) kana kudarika ipapo
37_148: Uye vakatenda; naizvozvo takava tinovapa mafaro kwekanguva
37_149: Vabvunze (Muhammad (SAW)): “Kuna Tenzi vako ndiko kune vanasikana uye kwavari ndiko kune vanakomana here?”
37_150: “Kana kuti takasika ngirozi dzechikadzi here ivo vachiona (vachipupura)?”
37_151: Zvirokwazvo, zvingori zvemanyepo avo (vasingatendi) kuti vanoti
37_154: Dambudziko renyu nderei? Ko munoronga sei
37_156: Kana kuti mune kodzero iri pachena here
37_157: Naizvozvo huyai neGwaro renyu kana muri pachokwadi
37_158: Uye vakagadzira ushamwari pakati pavo (Allah) nemaJinn, asi ivo maJinn anoziva zvakanaka kuti arikuzomira pamberi pavo (Allah)
37_159: Kurumbidzwa ndekwaAllah! Kubva kune izvo zvavanovasanganisa (zvavanovatsanangudza) nazvo
37_162: Hamukwanise kurasisa (kusandura avo vanotenda muna Allah)
37_164: Uye hakuna pakati pedu (ngirozi) kusara kwekuti ine chinzvimbo chinozivikanwa
37_165: Uye zvirokwazvo, isu (ngirozi) tinomira mumitsara (tichinamata sezvamunoita maMuslim pakunamata)
37_166: Uye zvirokwazvo, isu (ngirozi) ndisu avo vanorumbidza (Allah)
37_168: “Dai tiine muyeuchidzi sevanhu vekare (Muporofita Muhammad (SAW) asati auya).”
37_170: Asi (Qur’aan rave rinouya) havasi kutenda mariri, naizvozvo vachaziva
37_171: Uye zvirokwazvo, shoko redu rakatopfuura kuvaranda vedu, vatumwa
37_173: Uye zvirokwazvo mauto edu achava vakundi
37_176: Vari kuda kukurumidzira mutongo wedu here
37_177: Naizvozvo paunodzikiswa muzvivanze zvavo (padyo navo), kuipa kuchava mangwanani eavo vakayeuchidzwa
37_180: Kurumbidzwa ndekwaTenzi vako, Tenzi veruremekedzo nesimba! Kubva	mune izvo zvavanovasanganisa (zvavanovatsanangudza) nazvo
37_182: Uye kurumbidzwa nekutendwa ndekwaAllah, Tenzi vepasi rose (vanhu nemaJinn nezvese zviripo)
38_1: Swaad. (Aya mavara hapana anoziva zvaanoreva kunze kwaAllah). Ndinopika neQur’aan rizere neyeuchidzo yose
38_2: Nokudaro avo vasingatendi vari mukuzvitutumadza nekupikisa
38_3: Mapoka mangani evanhu atakaparadza ivo vasati vavapo! Uye vakachema apo nguva yekutiza pakanga pasisina
38_4: Uye ivo (maArabhu) vanoshamiswa nokuti muyeuchidzi (Muhammad (SAW)) ava anouya kwavari kubva pakati pavo. Uye vasingatendi vanoti: “Uyu (Muporofita Muhammad (SAW)) munhu wemapipi uye munyepi.”
38_5: “Aita vanamwari (vose) kuva Mwari mumwechete? Zvirokwazvo, ichi chinhu chinoshamisa!”
38_6: Uye vatungamiriri vavo vakaenderera mberi (vachiti): “Endererai mberi, uye shingirirai nanamwari venyu! Zvirokwazvo, ichi chinhu chakarongwa (chakanangana nemi)!”
38_7: “Hatina	kumbonzwa	(zvakafanana)	neizvi	muchitendero	chemazuva	ano	(chiKristu). Zvirokwazvo, hakuna chimwe chinhu kusara kwekuti chakagadzirwa!”
38_8: ��Yeuchidzo yadzikiswa here kwaari (chete) kubva kwatiri?” Asi vari mukugunun’una nezveyeuchidzo yangu (Qur’aan)! Asi havasati varavira marwadzo angu
38_9: Kana kuti vane mubairo wenyasha kubva kuna Tenzi vako, Samasimba, Mupi chaiye-iye
38_10: Kana kuti vane humambo hwepasi nekudenga nezviri pakati pazvo ndezvavo? Kana zviri izvozvo ngavakwire kumusoro (kudenga) nechero nzira dzavanokwanisa
38_11: Vachava mauto achakurirwa kunge zvikwata zvenguva yekare
38_12: Kumashure kwavo kune vanhu vakaramba, vanhu vaNowa, uye vaAad, uye Farawo muridzi wehoko (dzaairwadzisa vanhu nadzo)
38_13: Uye maThamood, nevanhu vaLoti, uye nevagari vemusango, ivavo ndivo vakanga vari zvikwata
38_14: Hapana mumwe wavo asi kuti vakaramba vatumwa. Naizvozvo mutongo wangu wange uri wechokwadi (wakakodzera)
38_15: Uye ava vakangomirira hwamanda imwechete, uye haizomiri (kurira kusvikira zvose zvaparara kusara kwaAllah)
38_16: Uye vanoti: “Tenzi vedu! Tiratidzei nekukasika Qittana (Bhuku redu remabasa akanaka neakaipa kuti tive tinoaona) zuva rekutongwa risati rasvika!”
38_17: Tsungirira (Muhammad (SAW)) pane zvavanotaura, uye rangarira muranda wedu Davhidha aiva nesimba. Zvirokwazvo, aiva munhu aireurura kuna Allah
38_18: Zvirokwazvo,	takaita	kuti	makomo	naiye	zvive	zvinorumbidza	munguva	yemasikati nemangwanani
38_19: Uye shiri dzakaunganidzwa, dzose dzaimuteerera (Davhidha) (dzaiuya dzichirumbidza zita raAllah pamwechete naye)
38_20: Uye takaita kuti humambo hwake husimbe, uye takamupa Al-Hikmah (Huporofita) uye kutonga nekutaura kwakanaka
38_21: Hadzina kusvika kwauri here nhau dzevaipomerana mhosva? Pavakakwira pamusoro peMihraab (imba yekunamatira)
38_22: Pavakapinda maiva naDawood (Davhidha), akavatya. Vakati: “Usatye! (Tiri) vaviri vari kupomerana mhosva, umwe wedu akanganisira umwe. Naizvozvo titonge nechokwadi, uye zvakare usave unorega kuenzanisa, uye titungamirire kunzira yakatwasuka.”
38_23: “Zvirokwazvo, mukoma wangu uyu (muchitendero) ane hwai makumi mapfumbamwe nepfumbamwe (99), asi ini ndine hwai imwechete (chete), uye akati: ‘Ndipe (hwai iyoyo)’, uye akandikurira mumashoko.”
38_24: Dawood (Davhidha) akati (asina kuteerera rimwe divi): “Zvirokwazvo, akakukanganisira nekuda hwai yako kuti awedzere pane hwai dzake. Uye zvirokwazvo vashandi pamwechete (vanoisa upfumi pamwechete) vakawanda vanodzvanyirira vamwe, kusara kwevanotenda uye vachiita mabasa akanaka, uye vashoma.” Uye Dawood (Dhavhidha) akazviona kuti zvirokwazvo tamuedza, uye akabva akumbira ruregerero kuna Tenzi vake, uye akabva apfugama achireurura
38_25: Naizvozvo takamuregerera, uye zvirokwazvo ari padyo nekusvika kwatiri, uye nenzvimbo yakanaka kudzokera (Paradhiso)
38_26: Iwe Dawood (Dhavhidha)! Zvirokwazvo, takakuita mumiririri panyika, naizvozvo tonga vanhu nechokwadi, uye usave unotevedzera chido chako nekuti chichakurasisa kubva munzira yaAllah. Zvirokwazvo, avo vanorasika kubva munzira yaAllah, vachave nemutongo wakaomarara nekuti vakakanganwa zuva rekutongwa
38_27: Uye hatina kusika denga nenyika nezvose zviri pakati pazvo pasina chinangwa! Ndiwo mafungiro evasingatendi! Naizvozvo matambudziko kune avo vasingatendi (muIslaam) kubva kumoto
38_28: Tingabate avo vanotenda (muna Allah) uye vanoita mabasa akanaka semabatiro atinoita maMufsidoon (avo vanosanganisa Allah nezvimwe zvinhu mukunamata uye vachiita zvitadzo) panyika? Kana kuti tingabate maMuttaqoon (avo vanhu vanotya Allah) semaFujjaar (vanhu vasingatendi uye vanoita mabasa akaipa)
38_29: (Iri) Igwaro ratakatumira kwauri, rizere nemakomborero, kuti vave vanodzamisa pfungwa (vanorangarira) mundima dzaro, uye kuti vanhu vanonzwisisa vave vanorangarira
38_30: Uye Dawood (Dhavhidha) takamupa Sulaimaan (Soromoni). Muranda akanaka! Zvirokwazvo, aikumbira ruregerero (kwatiri)
38_31: Paakaratidzwa nguva dzemasikati, mabhiza akapingudzwa emhando yepamusoro (achienda kunorwa munzira yaAllah)
38_32: Akati: “Ini ndada zvakanaka (mabhiza aya) kupinda kurangarira Tenzi vangu (pamunamato wangu wemasikati, Asr)” kusvikira nguva yadarika, uye (zuva) raenda muna amai varo
38_33: Ndokubva ati: “Uyai nawo (Mabhiza) kwandiri!” Akatanga kufambisa ruoko rwake pamakumbo nepahuro pawo (kusvikira kuratidzwa kwapera)
38_34: Uye zvirokwazvo takava tinoedza Sulaimaan (Soromoni). Takava tinoisa Jasad (Dhiyabhorosi) pachigaro chake (akatorasikirwa nehumambo kwekanguvana), uye akava anodzokera (kuna Allah nekuteerera nekukumbira ruregerero, uye pahumambo wake nekuda kwaAllah)
38_35: Akati: “Tenzi vangu! Ndiregererei, mova munondipa umambo usina achazova nawo mushure mangu. Zvirokwazvo, ndimi mupi.”
38_36: Naizvozvo takamupa mhepo, yaivhuvhuta zvinyoro-nyoro nokuda kwake kwose kwaaida
38_37: Uyezve maShayaatween (vanaDhiyabhorosi) kubva kumaJinn kusanganisira mhando yose yemuvaki nemushambiri
38_39: (Allah vakati kuna Sulaimaan): “Ichi ndicho chipo chedu, saka ipa kana chengeta zvisina mubvunzo.”
38_40: Uye zvirokwazvo ange ari pedyo nesu, uye ane nzvimbo yakanaka yokudzokera (Paradhiso)
38_41: Uye rangarira muranda wedu Ayyoob (Jobho), paakakumbira Tenzi vake achiti: “Zvirokwazvo, Dhiyabhorosi (Satani) andiedza nemarwadzo (urwere) pamwechete nemutongo (kuparadza upfumi wangu)!”
38_42: (Allah vakati kwaari): “Rova pasi netsoka yako. Ichi chitubu chemvura yekugeza inotonhora uye yekunwa.”
38_43: Uye takamudzosera (zvakare) mhuri yake pamwechete nevamwe vane huwandu hwakafanana navo setsitsi kubva kwatiri, uye sendangariro kune avo vanonzwisisa
38_44: “Uye tora muruoko rwako chisvumbu cheuswa worova nacho (mukadzi wako), uye usatyora chitsidzo chako.” Zvechokwadi, takamuwana aine kutsungirira. Muranda akanaka! Zvirokwazvo, aiva anokumbira ruregerero (kwatiri)
38_45: Uye rangarira varanda vedu Ibrahim (Abrahamu), Ishaaq (Isaka), naYa’qoob (Jakobho), vaiva nesimba (mukutinamata) uye mukunzwisisa chitendero
38_46: Zvirokwazvo takavasarudza nekuvapa (chanakaka chinova) kurangarira imba (yekudenga)
38_47: Uye vanesu zvirokwazvo pane vakasarudzwa uye vakanaka
38_48: Uye rangarira Ismail (Ishumaeri), Alyasa’ (Elaisha) naDhul-Kifl (Isaiah), vose vari pakati pevakanaka
38_49: Iyi iyeuchidzo. Uye zvirokwazvo Al-Muttaqoon (vanotya Allah) vachave nemagumo akanaka (Paradhiso)
38_51: Vachave vanozorora mairi, vova vanosheedzera michero yakawanda nezvinwiwa
38_52: Uye parutivi pavo pachave neQaasiraat-At-Tarf (madzimai anozvibata asingadi vamwe varume kunze kwevarume vavo chete) vemazera akaenzana
38_53: Izvi ndizvo zvamunovimbiswa (imi vanotya Allah) pazuva rekutongwa
38_54: (Zvichanzi kwavari): Zvirokwazvo iyi iraramo yedu isingaperi
38_55: Zvakadaro! Uye avo vanopfurikidza mwero (vasingatendi) vachave nokudzokera kwakaipa (Moto)
38_56: Gehena! Mavachatsvira, uye inzvimbo yakaipa yekuzororera
38_57: Zvakadaro! Naizvozvo vasiyei varavire mvura inopisisa uye netsvina inobuda muzvironda
38_58: Uye imwe (mitongo) yakafanana neuyu – yese pamwechete
38_59: Iri iboka ramuchapinda naro (muGehena), havana muchingamidzo! Zvirokwazvo, vachave vanotsva mumoto
38_60: Ivo (vatevedzeri vevakarasika) vachati: “Uye nemi! Hakuna muchingamidzo kwamuri! Ndimi mava munounza izvi kwatiri (nekutirasisa kwenyu panyika), naizvozo iyi inzvimbo yakaipa kugara!”
38_61: Vachati: “Tenzi vedu! Chero ani aunza izvi kwatiri, muwedzerei mutongo wakapetwa mumoto!”
38_62: Uye vachati: “Dambudziko redu nderei, hatisi kuona vanhu vataiverengera pavaipi?”
38_63: “Taivatora sechisekwa, kana kuti maziso edu arikutadza kuvaona?”
38_64: Zvirokwazvo, ichi ichokwadi kupikisana kwevanhu vemumoto
38_65: Iti (Muhammad (SAW)): “Ndingori muyambiri, uye hakuna mumwe mwari (ane kodzero yekunamatwa) kunze kwaAllah, Mumwechete, Samasimba.”
38_66: “Tenzi vematenga nenyika uye nezvose zviri mazviri, vane simba rose, vanoregerera.”
38_69: “Ndakanga ndisina ruzivo rwemadzimambo epamusoro (ngirozi) pavaipikisana vachikurukura (nezvekusikwa kwaAdam).”
38_70: “Izvi zvave zvinodzikiswa kwandiri, kuti ini ndingori muyambiri ari pachena.”
38_71: (Yeuka) apo Tenzi vako vakati kungirozi: “Muchokwadi, ndichava ndinosika munhu kubva muivhu.”
38_72: “Naizvozvo kana ndamuumba zvakakwana uye ndikamufemera mweya wandakasika, mova munomupfugamira.”
38_74: Kusara kwaDhiyabhorosi, akazvitutumadza uye akava umwe wevasingatendi
38_75: (Allah) vakati: “Iwe Dhiyabhorosi! Chii chakudzivisa kubva mukupfugamira uyo wandasika nemaoko angu? Unozvitutumadza here kana kuti wava umwe wepamusoro-soro?”
38_76: Iblees (Dhiyabhorosi) akati: “Ndiri nani pane iye. Makandisika kubva mumoto, uye mamusika kubva kuivhu.”
38_77: (Allah) vakati: “Naizvozvo ibva muno! Zvirokwazvo, uri umwe weavo vakarasirirwa.”
38_78: “Uye zvirokwazvo kurengera kwangu kuchave pauri kusvika muzuva rokupihwa mubhadharo.”
38_79: Iblees (Dhiyabhorosi) akati: “Tenzi vangu! Ndipei kurarama (nguva) kusvika pazuva ravachamutswa (kubva kuvafi).”
38_80: (Allah) vakati: “Zvirokwazvo, uri umwe weavo vakapihwa nguva (kurarama).”
38_83: “Kusara kwevaranda venyu vanotenda vamakasarudza pakati pavo.”
38_85: “Ndichazadza Gehena newe (Satani) neavo vose kubva kwavari (vanhu) vanokutevera.”
38_86: Iti (Muhammad (SAW)): “Handikukumbirii mubairo pariri (Qur’an), uye handisi umwe wevanonyengedza.”
38_88: “Uye zvirokwazvo muchaona chokwadi charo mushure mekanguva.”
39_1: Zvakadzikiswa zveBhuku iri (Qur’aan) kubva kuna Allah, Samasimba, Vane huchenjeri hwese
39_2: Zvirokwazvo, takadzikisa Bhuku kwauri (Muhammad (SAW)) muchokwadi. Naizvozvo namata Allah (Vega) nekuita mabasa echitendero nemoyo wose uchifadza Allah
39_3: Zvirokwazvo, chitendero ndecha Allah Voga. Uye avo vanotora vabatsiri kunze kwaAllah (vanoti): “Tinovanamata kuti vatiswededze pedyo naAllah.” Zvirokwazvo, Allah vachatonga pakati pavo maererana izvo zvavanopesana. Zvirokwazvo, Allah havatungamiriri uyo anonyepa, uye asingatendi
39_4: Dai Allah vaida kuita mwana, vangadai vakasarudza wavaida pakati pevavakasika. Kurumbidzwa ngakuve kwavari! NdiAllah, Mumwechete, Samasimba
39_5: Vakasika matenga nepasi muchokwadi. Vanoita kuti husiku hupinde muzuva uye vanoita kuti zuva ripinde muhusiku. Uye vakapa mutemo kuzuva nemwedzi. Chimwe nechimwe chinofamba (munzira ne) munguva yakatarwa. Zvirokwazvo, ndivo Samasimba, Vanoregerera zvikuru
39_6: Vakakusikai kubva kumunhu mumwechete (Adam); uyezve vakasika mukadzi wake (Hawwa (Evha)) kubva kwaari (Adam). Uye vakava vanokutumirai zvipfuyo zvisere dziri zviviri zviviri (hwai yechirume neyechikadzi; mbudzi yechirume neyechikadzi; mombe yechirume neyechikadzi; ngamera yechirume neyechikadzi). Vanokusikai muzvibereko zvanaamai venyu, chisikwa mushure mechisikwa mumarima matatu. Ava ndiAllah, Tenzi venyu. Kwavari ndiko kune humambo. Laa ilaaha illaa Huwa (Hakuna chimwe chinhu chine kodzero yekunamatwa kunze kwavo). Naizvozvo, sei muchiitwa kuti mufuratire
39_7: Mukasatenda, zvirokwazvo, Allah ndivo mupfumi pamusoro penyu. Havafadzwi nekusatenda kwevaranda vavo. Uye mukatenda, vanofadzwa nemi. Hakuna munhu achatakura mutoro wemumwe. Uye kuna Tenzi venyu ndiko kwamuchadzokera, uye vachava vanokuudzai zvamaiita. Zvirokwazvo, vanoziva zvikuru zviri mumoyo
39_8: Uye marwadzo akabata munhu, anochema kuna Tenzi vake, achikumbira ruregerero kwavari. Asi vakamupa makomborero kubva kwavari, anokanganwa zvaakanga achichemera kumashure, ogadzira vamwe vanamwari vanopokana naAllah, kuti ave anorasisa vamwe kubva munzira yavo. Iti: “Wana mufaro nekusatenda kwako kwekanguva kadiki. Zvirokwazvo, uri mumwe vevagari vemumoto!”
39_9: Angave here uyo anoteerera Allah, achipfugama kana kumira (pamunamato) munguva dzeusiku, achitya hupenyu hunotevera, uye ane chivimbo chetsitsi dzaTenzi vake (akaenzana here neuyo asingatendi)? Iti: “Vakaenzana here avo vanoziva neavo vasingazivi?” Zvirokwazvo, vanoyeuka ndeavo vanhu vanonzwisisa
39_10: Iti (Muhammad (SAW)): “Imi varanda vangu vanotenda (muhumwechete hwaAllah), ivai munotya Tenzi venyu. Runako (Mubairo) nderwe avo vanoita mabasa akanaka panyika pano, uye nyika yaAllah yakakura (kuti kana musingakwanisi kuvanamata pane imwe nzvimbo munovanamata kumwe). Zvirokwazvo, avo vanotsungirira vachawana mubairo wavo wakazara pasina kutongwa (kuverengerwa).”
39_11: Iti (Muhammad SAW)): “Zvirokwazvo, ndakave ndinokomekedzwa kunamata Allah (Voga) nekuvateerera nokuita mabasa echitendero ndichiitira ivo chete.”
39_12: “Uye ndakave ndinokomekedzwa (izvi) kuti ndive mumwe weavo vekutanga kuzvipira kuna Allah (muIslaam) (maMuslim).”
39_13: Iti (Muhammad (SAW)): “Zvirokwazvo, ndikasateerera Tenzi vangu, ndinotya mutongo wezuva guru.”
39_14: Iti (Muhammad (SAW)): “Ndinonamata Allah Voga ndichiita mabasa echitendero ndichiitira ivo chete (pasina kuda kuonererwa kana kuvasanganisa nezvimwe zvinhu pakuvanamata).”
39_15: “Naizvozvo namatai zvamunoda kunze kwavo (Allah).” Iti (Muhammad (SAW)): “Vakarasikirwa ndeavo vacharasikirwa pachezvavo nemhuri dzavo pazuva rekutongwa. Zvirokwazvo, kuchave kurasikirwa kuri pachena!”
39_16: Vachava nekuvharirwa nemoto, pamusoro pavo uye kuvharirwa pasi pavo. Allah vanovhundutsa varanda vavo neizvi: “Imi varanda vangu! Naizvozvo ivai munonditya!”
39_17: Avo vanodzivirira At-Taghoot (vanamwari venhema) nokusavanamata, uye votendeukira kuna Allah (vachikumbira ruregerero), kwavari kune shoko rakanaka; naizvozvo svitsa mashoko akanaka kuvaranda vangu
39_18: Avo vanoteerera shoko (rokuti hakuna mumwe mwari ane kodzero yekunamatwa kunze kwaAllah), uye votevera zvakanaka zvacho (vonamata Allah chete, vokumbira ruregerero kwavari uye wosiya vanamwari venhema), ava ndivo vakatungamirirwa naAllah uye ndivo vanhu vanonzwisisa
39_19: Uye uyo shoko remutongo rakatarwa paari (akafanana here neuyo asingaiti zvivi)? Unganunure here (Muhammad (SAW)) uyo ari mumoto
39_20: Asi avo vanotya Tenzi vavo (Allah), vachave nedzimba, imwe iri pamusoro peimwe dzakavakwa (dzakaturikidzana) pasi padzo nzizi dzichiyerera. (Iyi) ivimbiso yaAllah. Uye Allah havakundikani pavimbiso yavo
39_21: Hauoni here kuti zvirokwazvo Allah vanodzikisa mvura kubva kudenga, uye vokonzera kuti mvura ipinde pasi, (uye voita kuti ibude kubva pasi) sezvitubu zvemvura, pedzezvo vokudza nayo zvirimwa zvine mavara akasiyana-siyana, pedzezvo zvoibva uye ozviona zvichiita ruvara rwezerere, uye vozviita zviome zvova zvidimbu zvidimbu. Zvirokwazvo, mazviri mune ndangariro kuvanhu vanonzwisisa
39_22: Uyo moyo wake Allah wavakazarurira Islaam kuti ave muchiedza kubva kuna Tenzi vake (akafanana here neuyo asiri mutendi)? Naizvozvo matambudziko kune avo moyo yavo yakaoma kurangarira Allah! Ndeavo vakarasika zviripachena
39_23: Allah vakadzikisa shoko rakanakisisa, Gwaro (Qur’aan), zvidimbu zvaro zvakafanana nezvimwe (mune zvakanaka uye muhuchokwadi) uye zvichidzokorodzwa-dzokorodzwa. Makanda eavo vanotya Tenzi vavo anobvunda kubva mariri (pavanoriverenga kana pavanorinzwa). Pedzezvo ganda ravo nemoyo yavo yozvininipisa mukurangarira Allah. Iri ndiro gwara raAllah. Vanotungamirira wavanoda naro. Uye uyo munhu Allah wavanoita kuti arasike, kwaari haana mutungamiri
39_24: Haasi here, uyo achazotarisana nemutongo wakaipisisa zuva rekutongwa (akafanana here neuyo achapinda Paradhiso murunyararo)? Uye zvichanzi kuvaiti vemabasa akaipa: “Ravirai izvo zvamaiwana!”
39_25: Avo vaivepo mushure mavo vakaramba, uye marwadzo akauya kwavari kubva kumativi avaisatarisira
39_26: Naizvozvo Allah vakaita kuti vave vanoravira kudzikisirwa muhupenyu hwepasi, asi marwadzo ehupenyu hwuchatevera akakura, dai vaiziva
39_27: Uye zvirokwazvo takava tinoisira vanhu mhando yose yeenzaniso muQur’aan iri kuti vave vanorangarira
39_28: Qur’aan rerurimi rwechiArab risina kutsveyama (mariri) kuti vave vanodzivirira zvose zvakaipa zvavakakomekedzwa naAllah kuti vave vanodzivirira kuti vave vanotya
39_29: Allah vanopa muenzaniso wemurume (muranda) ane madzimambo akawanda anopikisana (sekunge avo vanonamata vamwe pamwechete naAllah), nemurume anongova namambo mumwe chete (sekunge avo vanonamata Allah chete). Vakafanana here vaviri ava mumuenzaniso wavo? Kurumbidzwa kwose ndekwaAllah! Asi vazhinji vavo havazivi
39_30: Zvirokwazvo, iwe (Muhammad (SAW)) uchafa, uye zvirokwazvo ivo vachafa
39_31: Uye zvirokwazvo pazuva rekutongwa muchava munopikisana (munopokana) pamberi paTenzi venyu
39_32: Naizvozvo, ndiani anokanganisa zvakanyanya kudarika uyo anotaura manyepo pamusoro paAllah, uye oramba chokwadi (Islaam) mushure mekunge chauya kwaari! Hamuna here nzvimbo muGehena (moto) yeavo vasingatendi
39_33: Uye uyo (Muhammad (SAW)) akauya nechokwadi (Islaam) uye akatenda machiri, ivavo ndivo vanotya Allah
39_34: Kwavari vachave neizvo zvavanoshuvira kubva kuna Tenzi vavo. Uyo ndiwo mugove wevatsvene (vanotya Allah)
39_35: Kuti Allah vave vanovabvisira zvakaipa zvavakaita, vovapa mugove unoenderana nezvakanaka zvavaiita
39_36: Allah havakwaniri muranda wavo here? Uye vanokushungurudza neizvo (zvavanonamata) kunze kwavo. Uye uyo Allah wavanoita kuti arasike, kwaari hapana mutungamiriri
39_37: Uye uyo Allah wavanotungamiririra, kwaari hapana anomuita kuti arasike. Havasi here Allah samasimba, muridzi wemurango
39_38: Uye kana ukavabvunza: “Ndiani akasika matenga nenyika?” Zvirokwazvo vanoti: “Allah.” Iti: “Saka ndiudzei izvo zvamunonamata kusara kwaAllah, kana Allah vachinge vandishuvira chakaipa, vanokwanisa kuchibvisa here? Kana kuti (Allah) vakandishuvira tsitsi (nyasha), vanokwanisa kudzibvisa (kudzora) tsitsi dzavo here?” Iti: “Allah vanondikwanira; mavari (vanotenda) vanovimba (ndiko kwavanoisa kuvimba kwavo.”)
39_39: Iti (Muhammad (SAW)): “Imi vanhu vangu! Shandai zvinoenderana nezvamuri. Zvirokwazvo ini ndiri kushanda (zvinoenderana neni). Naizvozvo muchava munoziva.”
39_40: “Kuna ani kuchaenda mutongo unodzikisira, uye kuna ani kuchava nemutongo usingaperi.”
39_41: Zvirokwazvo, takava tinodzikisa kwauri (Muhammad (SAW)) Gwaro (Qur’an) revanhu muzvokwadi. Saka ani nani achatambira gwara, azviitira pachake; uye uyo acharasika, anorasika pachake. Uye hausi Wakeel (mumiririri, muchengetedzi) wavo
39_42: NdiAllah vanotora mweya yevanhu panguva dzerufu rwavo, uye avo vasingafi panguva dzekurara (vakarara) kwavo. (Allah) vanochengeta avo vavakarongera (vavakatarira) rufu, uye vosiya vamwe vose kusvikira nguva yakatarwa. Zvirokwazvo, mune izvi mune zviratidzo kuvanhu vanofunga zvakanyanya
39_43: Vanotora here (vamwe) sevamiriri kunze kwaAllah? Iti: “Kunyange vasina simba pamusoro pechimwe chinhu uye vasina uchenjeri?”
39_44: Iti: “Kumiririra kwose ndekwaAllah. Kwavari ndiko kune umambo hwematenga nepasi. Zvakare kwavari muchava munodzorerwa.”
39_45: Uye kana Allah chete vachinge vataurwa nezvavo, moyo yeavo vasingatendi mune ramangwana inozadzwa nekushushikana. Asi kana izvo (zvinonamatwa kunze kwaAllah) zvichinge zvataurwa nezvazvo, ngwarirai, vanofara (vanonzwa kusununguka)
39_46: Iti (Muhammad (SAW)): “Imi Allah! Musiki wedenga nenyika, muzivi wezvose zvisingaonekwi nezvinoonekwa! Muchatonga pakati pevaranda venyu pamusoro peizvo zvavaipikisana.”
39_47: Uye avo vaikanganisa, dai vaine zvese zviri panyika nezvimwe zvakadaro, zvirokwazvo vaizozvipa kuzvidzivirira nazvo kubva mumarwadzo ezuva rekutongwa. Uye zvichava pachena kwavari kubva kuna Allah izvo zvavainge vasina hanya nazvo
39_48: Uye huipi hweizvo zvavaiwana hwuchabuda pachena kwavari, uye izvo zvavaiseka zvichavakomberedza
39_49: Kana marwadzo akabata munhu anoshevedzera (anodana) kwatiri (achida rubatsiro), asi kana tikaasandura (marwadzo) kuaita makomborero kubva kwatiri, anoti: “Zvirokwazvo, ndazviwana nokuda kweruzivo (rwangu).” Asi ungori muedzo, asi vazhinji vavo havazvizivi
39_50: Zvirokwazvo, avo vaiva kumashure kwavo vakazvitaura, asi zvose zvavakawana hazvina kuvabatsira
39_51: Naizvozvo, huipi hweizvo zvavakawana hwakavakurira. Uye avo vanokanganisa pakati peava (vanhu wakatumirwa kwavari Muhammad (SAW)), vachava vanokurirwa nehuipi hweizvo zvavanowana, uye havasi kuzokwanisa kutiza
39_52: Havazivi here kuti Allah vanopa raramo kune uyo wavanoda, kana kuomesa (kune wavanoda). Zvirokwazvo, mune izvi mune zviratidzo kune vanhu vanotenda
39_53: Iti: “Imi varanda vangu avo vanozvikanganisira pachezvavo! Musave munoshaya tarisiro kubva mutsitsi dzaAllah. Zvirokwazvo Allah vanoregerera zvitadzo zvose. Zvirokwazvo, ndiwo muregereri, ane tsitsi dzose.”
39_54: “Uye tarirai mukukumbira rugerero uye nerukudzo nekuzvipira kwechokwadi kuna Tenzi venyu, mutongo usati wauya kwamuri, uye naizozvo hamuzombobatsirwi.��
39_55: “Uye teverai zvakanaka zveizvo zvatumirwa kwamuri kubva kuna Tenzi venyu, mutongo usati wauya kwamuri musina kutarisira!”
39_56: Apo munhu achati: “Kushushikana kwangu, ndange ndisingateereri Allah (handina kuita izvo zvakanzi naAllah ndiite), uye zvirokwazvo ndaive umwe weavo vaishora (chokwadi, Islaam)!”
39_57: Kana kuti anozoti: “Dai Allah vakanditungamirira, ndingadai ndiri umwe weavo vaitya (Allah).”
39_58: Kana kuti anozoti aona mutongo: “Dai ndakawana mukana (wekudzokera panyika), ndaizova umwe weavo vaiita mabasa akanaka.”
39_59: Hongu! Zvirokwazvo, zviratidzo zvangu zvakauya kwauri uye ukazviramba, uye ukazvitutumadza ukava umwe weavo vasingatendi
39_60: Uye zuva rekutongwa uchaona avo vainyepera Allah zviso zvavo zvichange zvakasviba. Hamuna here nzvimbo muGehena yeavo vaizvitutumadza
39_61: Uye Allah vachanunura vatsvene vovapinza nzvimbo dzavo dzebudiriro (Paradhiso). Zvakaipa hazvizombovabati kana kusuruvara
39_62: Allah ndivo musiki wezvose, uye ndivo mumiririri (muchengetedzi) wezvinhu zvose
39_63: Kwavari ndiko kune svumbunuro dzematenga nepasi. Uye avo vasingatendi muzviratidzo zvaAllah, ivavo ndivo vachange vakarasikirwa
39_64: Iti (Muhammad (SAW)): “Muri kundikomekedza kunamata zvimwe (zvisikwa) here kunze kwaAllah, imi vasina kukwana
39_65: Uye zvirokwazvo zvinodzikiswa kwauri (Muhammad (SAW)) sekunge kune avo vakanga variko usati wavapo: “Kana ukava unosanganisa Allah nezvimwe mukunamata, zvirokwazvo mabasa ako achange asina maturo, uye zvirokwazvo uchange uri pakati peavo vakarasikirwa.”
39_66: Nokudaro! Namata Allah (Voga), uye wova pakati peavo vanotenda
39_67: Uye havana kupa Allah kodzero yavo yakakwana. Uye pazuva rekutongwa pasi rose richabatwa muruoko rwavo uye matenga akaputirwa ari muruoko rwavo rwerudyi. Kurumbidzwa ngakuve kwavari, uye vari pamusoro pezvavanovasanganisa nazvo
39_68: Uye hwamanda icharidzwa, uye zvose zviri mumatenga uye zvose zviri pasi zvichakomoka (zvichafa) kusara kweanodiwa naAllah. Uye icharidzwa kechipiri, uye zvirokwazvo vachava vanomira vakatarisa
39_69: Uye pasi pachapenya nechiedza chaTenzi waro (apo vachauya kunotonga vanhu), uye bhuku richava rinoiswa, uye maporofita nevapupuri vachava vanounzwa pamberi; uye vachava vanotongwa pakati pavo nechokwadi, uye havazodzvinyirirwa
39_70: Uye umwe neumwe achave anopihwa mubairo wakazara wezvaaiita, uye (Allah) vanoziva zvikuru zvavanoita
39_71: Uye avo vaisatenda vachava vanotinhirwa kuGehena vari muzvikwata, kusvika vasvika pariri, magedhe aro achava anovhurwa. Uye zvichanzi nevachengetedzi varo: “Vatumwa havana kuuya kwamuri here kubva mamuri vachikuverengerai ndima dzaTenzi venyu, uye vachikuyambirai nezvekusangana kwezuva renyu rino?” Vachati: “Hongu,” asi shoko remarwadzo rava rinokodzera vasingatendi
39_72: Zvichava zvinonzi (kwavari): “Pindai magedhe eGehena kuti mugare imomo. Uye (zvirokwazvo) inzvimbo yakaipisisa yevanozvitutumadza!”
39_73: Uye avo vaitya Tenzi vavo, vachava vanotungamirirwa kuParadhiso vari muzvikwata, kusvika vasvika pariri, uye magedhe aro achava anovhurwa, uye vachengetedzi varo vachati kwavari: “Rugare ngaruve kwamuri! Makaita zvakanaka, naizvozvo pindai mugare mariri (Paradhiso).”
39_74: Uye vachati: “Kurumbidzwa nekutendwa ngakuve kuna Allah, avo vatizadzikisira vimbiso yavo kwatiri, uye vatiita kuti tive tinogara munzvimbo iyi. Tinogara muParadhiso patinoda. Mubairo wakanaka zvakadii kune avo vaishanda!”
39_75: Uye uchava unoona ngirozi dzakatenderedza Chigaro (chaAllah) kubva kumativi ose, dzichirumbidza rumidzo yaTenzi wadzo. Uye vachatongwa pakati pavo nechokwadi (zvisikwa zvose). Uye zvichanzi: “Kurumbidzwa kose ngakuve kuna Allah, Tenzi wezvisikwa zvose (vanhu, maJinn nezvose zviripo).”
40_1: Haa – Meem. (Mashoko aya ndemamwe ezvishamiso zviri muQur’aan, uye hapana anoziva zvaanoreva kunze kwaAllah)
40_2: Mashoko akadzikiswa eGwaro (Qur’aan) anobva kuna Allah, Samasimba, Vazere neruzivo
40_3: Muregereri wezvitadzo, Mutambiri weruregerero, Vakaomesesa mumutongo, Mupi (wemakomborero). La ilaaha illaa Huwa (Hapana umwe ane kodzero yekunamatwa kunze kwavo), kwavari ndiko kune magumo
40_4: Hapana anopikisa muzviratidzo zvaAllah kunze kweavo vasingatendi. Saka (Muhammad (SAW)) usava unonyengedzwa nemafambiro avo panyika (nekuti magumo avo iGehena)
40_5: Vanhu vaNowa vakaramba (vatumwa vavo) mushure mavo uye nezvikwata mushure mavo; uye marudzi ose (aisatenda) akarongera mutumwa wavo kuti vamuparadze, uye vaipikisa vachishandisa manyepo kuti vavhiringidze (vakanganise) chokwadi nawo. Naizvozvo ndakavaparadza (nemutongo). Uye wakaoma sei mutongo wangu
40_6: Naizvozvo, shoko raTenzi vako rine kodzero kune vasingatendi kuti vachave vagari vekumoto
40_7: Idzo (ngirozi) dzinotakura Chigaro (chaAllah) neidzo dzakachikomberedza dzinorumbidza rukudzo rwaTenzi wadzo, uye dzichitenda mavari, uye dzinokumbirira ruregerero avo vanotenda (muumwechete waAllah) dzichiti: “Tenzi wedu! Munokomberedza zvinhu zvose mutsitsi neruzivo, naizvozvo regererai avo vanokumbira ruregerero uye vachitevera nzira yenyu, uye vanunurei kubva kumutongo wemoto!”
40_8: “Tenzi wedu! Movaita kuti vapinde mapindu eEden (Paradhiso) awo amakavavimbisa, uye kune vanoita mabasa akanaka kubva kune madzibaba avo, vakadzi vavo, uye vana vavo! Zvirokwazvo, ndimi Samasimba, Vane hungwaru hwose.”
40_9: “Uye vanunurei kubva ku (mutongo wezvavaiita kubva ku) zvitadzo, uye ani nani wamunenge manunura kubva kuzvitadzo musi uyu, zvirokwazvo, munenge mamuratidza tsitsi.” Uye uku ndiko kubudirira kwepamusoro
40_10: Avo vasingatendi vachataurirwa (Panguva yekupinda mumoto): “Ruvengo rwaAllah rwanga rwakanyanya kwamuri (Panyika pamairamba kutenda) kudarika ruvengo rwenyu pachenyu (mumoto), pamaidaidzwa kuzotenda asi muchiramba.”
40_11: Vachati: “Tenzi wedu! Makatiita kuti tife kaviri (takange takafa kumisana yavanababa vedu uye mushure meupenyu hwedu panyika), uye makatipa upenyu kaviri (upenyu patakazvarwa uye upenyu mushure mekunge tafa)! Uye tave tinopupura zvivi zvedu. Saka pane here nzira yokubuda nayo (mumoto)?”
40_12: (Vachaudzwa): “Nokuda kwekuti Allah chete pavaidaidzwa (mukunamata) maisatenda (mairamba), asi vamwe pavaisanganiswa navo, maitenda! Naizvozvo mutongo ndewa Allah, Vepamusoro-soro, Vakuru!”
40_13: Ndivo vanokuratidzai zviratidzo zvavo uye vanotumira raramo kwamuri kubva kudenga (mvura inokudza zvirimwa). Uye hapana anoyeuka kusara kweavo vanokumbira ruregerero (kuna Allah)
40_14: Naizvozvo, danai (iwe Muhammad (SAW) neavo vanotenda) Allah muchiita minamato yavo chete (nemabasa ese echitendero), kunyange vasingatendi vakazvivenga
40_15: (Ndivo Allah) Muridzi wezvinzvimbo zvepamusoro-soro, Muridzi weChigaro (chehumambo). Vanotumira mashoko nekuda kwavo kune uyo wavanoda kubva kuvaranda vavo, kuti ave anoyambira (vanhu) maererano nezvezuva rekusangana (Zuva rekutongwa)
40_16: Zuva iro ravachabuda vose, (uye) hapana chavo chichavanzwa kubva kuna Allah. Umambo ndewani muzuva ranhasi? (Allah vachazvipindura): Ndewa Allah, Vamwechete, Samasimba
40_17: Munhu wese achapihwa zvaakawana nhasi. Nhasi hapana ari kuzodzvanyirirwa. Zvirokwazvo, Allah vanokurumidza pakutonga
40_18: Uye vayeuchidze (Muhammad (SAW)) nezve zuva iri riri kuswedera pedyo, apo moyo ichange iri pahuro, uye havasi kuzokwanisa kuidzosera (moyo) muzvipfuva kana kuibuditsa panze. Vaiita mabasa akaipa havasi kuzova neshamwari, kana vamiririri, vari kuzoteererwa
40_19: Allah vanoziva kunyepa kwemaziso, uye nezvose zvinovigwa nezvipfuva
40_20: Uye Allah vanotonga muchokwadi, asi avo vavanonamata kunze kwavo, hapana chavanokwanisa kutonga. Zvirokwazvo, Allah vanonzwa zvese, vanoona zvese
40_21: Havana here kufamba munyika vakaona magumo eavo vaivapo mushure mavo? Vaive pamusoro pavo pasimba uye matsimba (avakasiya) ari panyika. Asi Allah vakavaparadza nemurango nekuda kwezvitadzo zvavo, uye havana akavachengetedza kubva kuna Allah
40_22: Izvi zvaiva, nokuti kwakauya kwavari vatumwa vavo nezviratidzo zviri pachena asi havana kutenda. Naizvozvo Allah vakavaparadza (nemutongo). Zvirokwazvo, ndivo vane simba rose, vane mutongo wakaomarara
40_23: Uye zvirokwazvo takava tinotumira Musa nezviratidzo zvedu, uye nemutemo uri pachena (wakajekeswa)
40_24: Kuna Farawo, Haamaan uye Qaaroon (Korah), asi vakamuti: “Muiti wemapipi, munyepi!”
40_25: Nokudaro paakavaunzira chokwadi kubva kwatiri, vakati: “Urayai vanakomana veavo vanotenda pamwechete naye mova munosiya vanhukadzi vavo kuti vararame.” Asi urongwa hwevasingatendi hauna budiriro asi kurasikirwa
40_26: Farawo akati: “Ndisiyei ndiuraye Musa, uye musiyei adane Tenzi vake (kuti vandidzivise kuti ndisamuuraye)! Ndinotya kuti angasandure chitendero chenyu, kana kukonzeresa kuti panyika pave nenyonga-nyonga (Mhirizhonga)!”
40_27: Musa akati: “Zvirokwazvo, ndinokumbira chengetedzo kubva kuna Tenzi vangu uye Tenzi venyu kubva kune wese anozvitutumadza asingatendi nezvezuva rekutongwa!”
40_28: Uye murume aitenda kubva mumhuri yaFarawo akaviga kutenda kwake akati: “Munouraya murume here nekuti ati: Tenzi vangu ndi Allah, uye zvirokwazvo auya kwamuri nezviratidzo zviri pachena kubva kuna Tenzi venyu? Uye kana ari munyepi, kwaari anenge aine chitadzo chekunyepa kwake; asi kana achitaura chokwadi mamwe matambudziko ari kukuvimbisai achava anokuwirai.” Zvirokwazvo, Allah havatungamiriri muMusrif (mudzvinyiriri, mhondi, mutadzi), munyepi
40_29: “Vanhu vangu! Hutongi ndewenyu nhasi, ndimi vepamusoro munyika. Asi ndiani achatinunura kubva mumarwadzo aAllah kana achinge auya kwatiri?” Farawo akati: “Ndinokuratidzai zvandinoona (zvakanaka), uye ndinokutungamirirai kunzira yakatwasuka!”
40_30: Uye uyo aitenda akati: “Vanhu vangu! Zvirokwazvo, ndinokutyirai (kuparadzwa) kwakafanana nekwezvikata (zvenguva yekare)!”
40_31: “Kunge kuparadzwa kwevanhu vaNowa, maAad nemaThamood neavo vakauya mushure mavo. Uye Allah havadi udzvanyiriri kuvaranda vavo.”
40_32: “Uye, vanhu vangu! Zvirokwazvo, ndinokutyirai zuva rekushevedzana (kudaidzana) (Pakati pevanhu vekumoto nevekuParadhiso).”
40_33: “Zuva ramuchatendeuka muchitiza musina mubetseri kubva kuna Allah. Uye uyo Allah wavanenge varasisa, hapana angamutungamirire.”
40_34: “Uye zvirokwazvo Yusuf (Josefa) akauya kwamuri munguva yakapfuura aine zviratido zviri pachena, asi hamuna kusiya kugunun’una mune zvaakakuunzirai, kusvika afa, mukati: ‘Hapana mutumwa achatumwa naAllah mushure make.’ Kudaro Allah vanosiya achirasika muMusrif (mudzvanyiriri, mutadzi) neMurtaab (uyo anogunun’una yambiro yaAllah).”
40_35: “Avo vanopikisana muzviratidzo zvaAllah pasina mvumo yauya kwavari, (zvavanoita) zvakavengwa zvikuru naAllah neavo vanotenda. Ndivo mavharirwo anoitwa naAllah moyo yewese anozvitutumadza, mudzvinyiriri.”
40_36: Uye Farawo akati: “Iwe Haamaan! Ndivakire mudhuri kuti ndive ndinosvika nzira.”
40_37: “Nzira dzematenga, uye kuti ndive ndinoona Mwari waMusa. Asi zvirokwazvo, ndinofunga kuti munyepi.” Naizvozvo, zvakaitwa kuti zvive zvinooneka sezvakanaka mumaziso aFarawo, huipi hwemabasa ake, uye akadziviswa kubva panzira yakatwasuka; uye kuronga kwaFarawo hakuna zvakwakamutungamira kusara kwekurasikirwa nekuparadzwa (kwake)
40_38: Uye murume aitenda akati: “Imi vanhu vangu! Teverai ini, ndichakutungamirirai kunzira yakatwasuka (Islaam).”
40_39: “Imi vanhu vangu! Chokwadi, hupenyu hwepano pasi hapana zvauri kusara kwemafaro, uye zvirokwazvo, hupenyu huchatevera inzvimbo yamuchagara nekusingaperi.”
40_40: “Uyo anenge aita basa rakaipa, haave anopihwa mubairo kusara kwezvakafanana nezvaanenge aita; uye uyo anenge aita basa rakanaka, angave murume kana mukadzi uye ari mutendi wechokwadi, ivavo vachapinda Paradhiso mavachapihwa raramo isina magumo.”
40_41: “Uye, imi vanhu vangu! Nemhaka yei ndinokudaidzirai kununuro asi imi munondidaidzira kumoto!”
40_42: “Munondidaidza kuti ndisatende muna Allah (muumwechete wavo), uye kuvasanganisa nezvimwe zvinhu mukunamata zvandisina ruzivo nazvo; uye ini ndinokukokai kumukuru wezvose, muregereri!”
40_43: “Pasina kugunun’una munondidaidza kuti (ndinamate) uyo asingandipi zvandinokumbira pano pasi kana muhupenyu huchatevera. Uye kudzokera kwedu kuchange kuri kuna Allah, uye Al- Musrifoon (vatadzi, vanopfurikidza mirairo yaAllah) vachava vagari vekumoto!”
40_44: “Uye muchave munorangarira zvandirikukuudzai, uye nyaya dzangu ndinodzisiya kuna Allah. Zvirokwazvo, Allah vanoona varanda vavo.”
40_45: Uye Allah vakamununura kubva kune zvakaipa zvavakanga varonga, asi murango wakaipa wakakomberedza vanhu vaFarawo
40_46: Moto, vanoburitswa pachena kwauri, mangwanani nemasikati. Uye pazuva iro nguva ichasvika (zvichava zvinonzi kungirozi): “Itai kuti vanhu vaFarawo vapinde marwadzo akaomarara!”
40_47: Uye, pavachava vanopikisana vari mumoto, vasina simba vachava vanoti kune avo vaizvitutumadza: “Zvirokwazvo, takakuteverai, munokwanisa here kubvisa kubva kwatiri chidimbu chemoto?”
40_48: Avo vaizvitutumadza vachava vanoti: “Tiri tose mumoto! Zvirokwazvo, Allah vatonga pakati pevaranda (vavo)!”
40_49: Uye avo vachange vari mumoto vachave vanoti kuvachengeti (ngirozi) veGehena: “Shevedzai Tenzi venyu kuti vave vanotirerutsira marwadzo kwezuva (rimwechete)!”
40_50: Vachati: “Vatumwa venyu havana kuuya kwamuri here nezviratidzo zviri pachena here?” Vachati: “Hongu.” Vachava vanopindura: “Shevedzai sekuda kwenyu! Uye chikumbiro chevasingatendi hachina basa (chakarasika) (nekuti Allah havachitambiri)!”
40_51: Zvirokwazvo, tichava tinoita kuti vatumwa vedu neavo vanotenda (muhumwechete waAllah) vave vakabudirira muhupenyu hwepano pasi uye muzuva iro vapupuri vachava vanomira (vachipupura pazuva rekutongwa)
40_52: Zuva iro vanoita mabasa akaipa zvichemo zvavo zvichange zvisingabatsiri. Kurengera (kutukwa) kuchange kuri kwavari, uye nzvimbo yakaipa ichange iri yavo
40_53: Uye zvirokwazvo takave tinopa Musa nungamiri uye takave tinogadza Gwaro (Torah) senhaka kuvana vaIzrairi
40_55: Naizvozvo iva unotsungirira (Muhammad (SAW)). Zvirokwazvo, vimbiso yaAllah ndeye chokwadi, uye kumbira ruregerero kubva kuzvitadzo zvako, wova unorumbidza rukudzo rwaTenzi vako munguva dzemasikati (kusvikira zuva radoka) uye munguva dzemangwanani (Hanzi zvichireva minamato mishanu pazuva kana kuti Asr neFajr)
40_56: Zvirokwazvo, avo vanopikisa pamusoro pezviratidzo zvaAllah vasina mvumo yauya kwavari, havana chimwe chinhu kusara kwekuzvitutumadza mumoyo yavo. Havasi kuzochiwana (chiporofita chawapihwa naAllah). Naizvozvo kumbira chengetedzo kuna Allah. Muzvirokwazvo, ndivo munzwi wezvose, muoni wezvose
40_57: Zvirokwazvo, kusikwa kwedenga nenyika kukuru kukunda kusikwa kwevanhu, asi vanhu vazhinji havazvizive
40_58: Uye havana kufanana avo vanoona neavo vasingaoni, kana avo vanotenda (muhumwechete hwaAllah) vachiita mabasa akanaka, neavo vanoita mabasa akaipa. Zvishoma ndizvo zvamunoyeuka
40_59: Zvirokwazvo, nguva iri kusvika (Zuva rekutongwa), hapana fungidziro nezvayo, asi vanhu vazhinji havatendi
40_60: Uye Tenzi venyu vakati: “Ndidanei, ndichava ndinokudavirai (zvichemo zvenyu). Zvirokwazvo, avo vanosiya kundinamata vachizvitutumadza vachapinda muGehena vakadzikisirwa!”
40_61: NdiAllah, avo vakagadzira usiku kuti muve munozorora mahuri, nemasikati kuti muve munoona. Muchokwadi, Allah vane makomborero akawanda kuvanhu, asi vanhu vazhinji havatendi
40_62: NdiAllah, Tenzi venyu, Musiki wezvose, hakuna mumwe ane mvumo yekunamatwa kunze kwavo (Laa ilaaha illaa Huwa). Naizvozvo sei muchifuratira (kubva kuna Allah nokunamata zvimwe zvisikwa kunze kwavo)
40_63: Naizvozvo vakarasiswa avo vairamba zviratidzo zvaAllah
40_64: NdiAllah, avo vakakugadzirirai nyika senzvimbo yekugara nedenga sechivhariso, uye vakakupai zvimiro vakave vanonakisa zvimiro zvenyu, uye vakakupai zvinhu zvakanaka. Ndivo Allah, Tenzi venyu, naizvozvo vakakomborerwa ndiAllah, Tenzi vezvinhu zvose
40_65: Ndivo vane kurarama kusingaperi, uye hakuna mumwe ane kodzero yokunamatwa kunze kwavo (Laa ilaaha illaa Huwa). Naizvozvo vadanei muchiita minamato yenyu yavo vega. Kurumbidzwa kwese ngakuve kuna Allah, Tenzi vezvinhu zvose (vanhu, maJinn nezvose zviripo)
40_66: Iti (Muhammad (SAW)): “Ndakave ndinorambidzwa kunamata zvose zvamunonamata muchisiya Allah, sezvo humboo hwakauya kwandiri kubva kuna Tenzi vangu; uye ndakave ndinokomekedzwa kuzvipira (kuIslaam) kuna Tenzi vezvinhu zvose.”
40_67: “Ndivo (Allah) vakakusikai kubva muvhu, pedzezvo kubva muNutfah (mbeu yababa naamai dzakasanganiswa), pedzezvo kubva pakagodo keropa, pedzezvo vakakuunzai (Panyika) sevana, pedzezvo vanokuitai kuti musvike zera rine simba rakakwana, uye mushure maizvozvo kukwegura (kuchembera), kunyange vamwe venyu vachifa mumashure, uye kuti mova munosvika nguva yakatarwa kuti muve munonzwisisa.”
40_68: Ndivo (Allah) vanopa upenyu uye vanokonzera rufu. Uye kana vachinge varonga chinhu vanongoti kwachiri: ‘Ivapo!’ chobva chavapo.”
40_69: Hauoni here avo vanopokana nezviratidzo zvaAllah? Vanofuratira sei (kubva kuchokwadi, Islaam)
40_70: Avo vanoramba Gwaro (Qur’aan) neizvo zvatakatumira nevatumwa vedu (kunamata Allah vamwechete) vachava vanoziva (pavachakandwa mumoto)
40_71: (Rangarirai) apo changadzo (ngetani) dzesimbi dzichange dzakamoneredzwa pamitsipa yavo, uye ngetani, vachave vanodhonzwa
40_72: Mumvura inopisa, uyezve vachava vanopiswa mumoto
40_73: Uyezve zvichanzi kwavari: “Varikupi avo (vose) vamaisanganisa (naAllah) mukunamata
40_74: Kunze kwaAllah?” Vachati: “Vanyangarika kwatiri. Asi, hatina kudana (kunamata) chimwe chinhu mumashure.” Saizvozvo Allah vanoita kuti vasingatendi varasike
40_75: Izvi nokuda kwekuti maifara panyika zvisina mvumo (kodzero), uye maifara zvakapfuurikidza
40_76: Pindai misuwo yeGehena kuti mugaremo. Uye (Zvirokwazvo) inzvimbo yakaipa sei kugara kune vanozvitutumadza
40_77: Saka tsungirira (Muhammad (SAW)); zvirokwazvo, vimbiso yaAllah ndeye chokwadi. Uye kunyange tikakuratidza (Muhammad (SAW)) zvimwe zvezvatakavavimbisa, kana kuti tikakuita kuti ufe naizvozvo kwatiri vachava vanodzorerwa
40_78: Uye zvirokwazvo takatumira vatumwa mushure mako (Muhammad (SAW)), vamwe vavo takave tinokuudza nhaurwa (nyaya) dzavo. Uye vamwe vavo hatina kuva tinokuudza nhaurwa (nyaya) dzavo, uye hazvina kuva zvinopihwa mutumwa upi zvake kuti ave anoburitsa chiratidzo kunze kwekuda kwaAllah. Asi kana murairo (mutongo) waAllah wauya, nyaya ichatongwa muchokwadi, uye vateveri vemanyepo vachava vanorasikirwa (nezvinhu zvose)
40_79: Allah ndivo vakakusikirai zvipfuwo, kuti muve munotaswa zvimwe zvazvo, uye zvimwe muve munodya
40_80: Uye mune (zvakawanda) zvekubatsirikana nazvo kubva mazviri (zvipfuwo). Uye kuti muve munowana nazvo zvido zvenyu zviri mumoyo yenyu, uye pazviri uye nengarava munotakurwa
40_81: Uye vanokuratidzai zviratidzo zvavo (zvehumwechete hwavo muzvinhu zvese zvataurwa pamusoro). Saka ndezvipi zvezviratidzo zvaAllah zvamuchava munoramba
40_82: Havana kufamba nenyika here vakaona kuti aiva sei magumo eavo vaivepo mumashure mavo? Vakange vakawanda muuwandu kuvapfuura uye vakakomba pasimba, uye mumatsimba panyika (avakasiya), asi havana kunge vanobatsirwa nezvavaiwana
40_83: Asi vatumwa vavo pavakauya nezviratidzo zviri pachena vakafadzwa nezvavakange vainazvo kubva kuruzivo (rwezvepanyika). Uye izvo zvavaitsvinya zvakavakomberedza (mutongo)
40_84: Asi pavakaona mutongo wedu, vakati: “Tinotenda muna Allah vamwechete uye tave tinoramba (zvose) zvataisanganisa navo (pakunamata)
40_85: Naizvozvo kutenda kwavo (muchi Islaam) hakuna kuvabatsira pavakaona mutongo wedu. (Sekunge) Iyi ndiyo yanga iri nzira yaAllah yekutonga nayo varanda vavo. Uye ipapo avo vasingatendi vakarasikirwa zvachose (apo mutongo wedu wakavakomberedza)
41_1: Haa – Meem. (Mashoko aya ndemamwe ezvishamiso zviri muQur’aan uye hapana anoziva zvaanoreva kunze kwaAllah)
41_2: Mashoko akadzikiswa kubva kune vane tsitsi zhinji (Allah) vane ngoni
41_3: Gwaro rine ndima dzakatsanangurwa zvizere, Qur’aan riri mururimi rwechiArab kuvanhu vanoziva
41_4: Richipa mashoko akanaka (ekupinda kuParadhiso kweavo vanotenda muhumwechete hwaAllah uye vachivatya), uye nekuyambira (avo vasingatendi kuti kune Gehena), asi vazhinji vavo vanofuratira, naizvozvo hapana chavanonzwa
41_5: Uye vanoti: “Moyo yedu yakafukidzwa kubva kune izvo zvaunotikokera kwazviri, uye munzeve dzedu mune umatsi, uye pakati pedu nemi pane mudhuri, naizvozvo shanda (Panzira yako), zvirokwazvo isu tiri kushanda (panzira yedu).”
41_6: Iti (Muhammad (SAW)): “Ini ndingori munhu semi. Zvakadzikiswa kwandiri kuti Mwari venyu ndiMwari vamwechete (Allah), naizvozvo torai nzira yakatwasuka kwavari (Islaam) movakumbira ruregerero. Uye matambudziko kumaMushrikoon (vanhu vanosanganisa Allah nezvimwe zvisikwa).”
