76_22: (Uye zvichanzi kwavari): “Zvirokwazvo mubairo ndewenyu, uye mabasa enyu atambirwa.”
76_24: Saka iva unotsungirira kumirairo ya Tenzi vako, uye usave unoteerera mutadzi kana asingatendi kubva mavari
76_25: Uye rangarira zita raTenzi vako mangwanani uye nemasikati (nekuita minamato yeFajr, Dhuhr neAsr)
76_26: Uye nguva yeusiku, pfugama kwavari (nekuita munamato weMaghrib neIsha), uye varumbidze muhusiku hurefu (Nemunamato weTahajjud)
76_27: Zvirokwazvo, ava (vasingatendi) vanoda upenyu wepano pasi, uye vanosendeka shure zuva rinorema (iro rinenge rakaoma)
76_28: Tisu takavasika, uye tikavaiita zvigwindiri. Kana tichida, zvirokwazvo tinokwanisa kuunza vamwe vanhu vakafanana navo panzvimbo yavo
76_29: Zvirokwazvo iyi (ndima) iyeuchidzo, saka kune uyo anoda, ngaasarudze nzira yekuna Tenzi vake (Allah)
76_30: Asi hamudi, kunze ivo Allah vada. Zvirokwazvo Allah ndivo muzivi wezvose, muchenjeri
76_31: Vachaisa mutsitsi dzavo uyo wevaranda wavanoda. Asi avo vanoita zvakaipa vakavagadzirira dambudzo rinorwadza
77_1: (Ndinopika) Ne (mhepo kana ngirozi, kana nhumwa dzaAllah) dzakatumwa imwe mushure meimwe
77_13: Zuva resarudzo (avo veParadhiso kubva kune avo vekuGehena)
77_14: Uye uchaziva sei kuti zuva resarudzo chii
77_15: Matambudziko pazuva iri kune avo vanoramba (Zuva Rekutongwa)
77_16: Hatina here kuparadza avo vange vari kumberi kwenyu
77_17: Uye tichaita vari mumashure mavo vave vanovatevera
77_18: Nenzira iyi tinoshanda nevapari vemhosva (vasingatendi nevatadzi)
77_23: Saka takaera, uye tisu nyanzvi dzekuera (zvinhu)
77_25: Hatina here kugadzira pasi senzvimbo yokugara
77_27: Uye tikagadzika imomo makomo akasimba nekureba, uye tikakupai mvura yekunwa inonaka
77_29: (Zvichanzi kune vasingatendi): “Gundumukai kubva kune izvo zvamairamba!”
77_30: “Gundumukai kumumvuri (wemoto weGehena hutsi huchikwidza) muzvikwata zvitatu.”
77_31: “Pasina mumvuri, kana kubatsira chimwe chinhu kubva murimi remoto.”
77_32: Zvirokwazvo, iro (Gehena) richakanda zvingaimi seAl-Qasr (zidanda rechitsiga)
77_33: Sekunge ingamera dzeruvara rwegoride kana tsapo retambo
77_35: Iri ndiro zuva ravasingatauri (padzimwe nguva dzaro)
77_38: Iri izuva resarudzo (remutongo). Takuunzai imi nevanhu vekutanga pamwechete
77_39: Saka kana pane zvamakaronga, shandisirai ini (Allah)
77_41: Zvirokwazvo, vanotya Allah vachave pakati pemimvuri nezvitubu
77_44: Zvirokwazvo, kudaro tinopa mubairo kuvanhu vezvakanaka
77_46: (Imi	vasingatendi)! Idyai	nekufara (muhupenyu	hwepano pasi) kwechinguva	chidiki. Zvirokwazvo, muri vaiti vezvakaipa
77_48: Kana zvikanzi kwavari: “Kotamai (mumunamato)! Havakotami (havaite minamato yavo)
77_50: Saka munhaurwa ipi mushure meiri (Qur’aan) vachatenda
78_2: Maererano nenhaurwa huru (Islaam, Qur’aan iri uye Zuva Rekutongwa)
78_8: Zvakare tikave tinokusikai muri vaviri vaviri (murume nemukadzi, akareba neakapfupika, akanaka neakaipa)
78_9: Uye tikava tinokupai hope kuti muve munozorora
78_11: Uye takasika masikati kuti muwane raramo
78_12: Tikava tinovaka pamusoro penyu matenga manomwe
78_14: Uye tikatumira mvura zhinji kubva kumakore
78_18: Zuva iro richaridzwa hwamanda, uye muchauya muri muzvikwata
78_20: Uye makomo achabviswa munzvimbo dzawo sezvinonzi aiva madzimudzangara
78_22: Nzvimbo ichapindwa neavo vanotyora mirawo yaAllah
78_24: Hapana kana chinwiwa chichange chichitonhorera chavachamwa imomo, kana chinwiwa chipi zvacho
78_25: Kusara kwemvura yakwatiswa, uye nezvose zvakaipa zvinobuda pamuviri
78_29: Uye zvinhu zvose takave tinozvinyora muGwaro
78_30: Saka chiravirai (magumo emabasa enyu akaipa). Hatisi kuzokuwedzerai kusara kwemarwadzo
78_31: Muzvokwadi, kune avo vanotya Allah kuchange kune budiriro (Paradhiso)
78_35: Havambonzwi imomo nhaurwa dzakaipa kana manyepo
78_36: Mubairo kubva kuna Tenzi vako, chipo chakaverengwa (chinoenderana nezvakanaka zvavaiita)
78_37: Kubva kuna Tenzi vematenga nepasi rino uye zvose zviri mukati mavo, vane ngoni zhinji, avo vasingakwanise kutaura navo (kunze kwekuti vavapa mvumo)
78_38: Pazuva iro Ar-Rooh (Gabriel kana imwe ngirozi) nengirozi dzichange dzakamira mumitsara, hapana achataura kana nani kusara kweuyo Allah vavanopa mvumo, uye achitaura zvinhu zvakanaka
78_39: (Pasina kana kusagutsikana) Iri ndiro zuva rechokwadi. Saka, uyo anoda ngaave anotsvaga nzvimbo yakanaka (kana nzira yakanaka ye) kuna Tenzi vake (nekuvateerera pasi rino)
78_40: Zvirokwazvo, takakuyambirai pamusoro pemarwadzo epadyo epazuva iro munhu wese achange achiona zvose zvakatungamidzwa nemaoko ake (zvaaita), uye uyo akange asingatendi achati: “Ndinokungura kuti ndingadai ndaiva ivhu.”
79_1: Ndinopika neidzo (ngirozi) dzinotora (upenyu hweuyo asingatendi) nechisimba
79_4: Uye neidzo dzinoenderera mberi nekumhanyidzana (ngirozi kana nyenyedzi kana mabhiza)
79_5: Uye idzo (ngirozi) dzinoronga kutevedzera mirairo yaTenzi vadzo, (saka zvirokwazvo imi vasingatendi muchabvunzwa)
79_6: Pazuva iro pasi rino nemakomo paachandengendeka zvakanyanya (uye wese achafa, hwamanda yekutanga yaridzwa)
79_10: Vanoti: “Tichadzoserwa zvirokwazvo here pahupenyu hwedu hwekare?”
79_13: Asi zvirokwazvo icharidzwa (hwamanda) kamwechete (kuridzwa kechipiri, Surah)
79_14: Apo vachazoona vava pamusoro pevhu (vari vapenyu mushure mekufa)
79_15: Hakuna here kuuya nhaurwa yaMusa kwauri
79_16: Apo Tenzi vake vakamushevedza munzvimbo inoera yeTuwaa
79_17: (Vakati kwaari): “Enda kuna Farawo, zvirokwazvo arikufurikidza mwero (nekusatenda nekuita zvakaipa).”
79_19: “Uye kuti ndive ndinokutungamira kuna Tenzi vako, kuti uve unovatya?”
79_25: Saka Allah vakamukweva nemutongo wekubva kwekutanga nekupedzisira kwekuraudzira kwake
79_26: Zvirokwazvo, mune izvi mune chidzidzo kune uyo anotya Allah
79_27: Munonetsa kusika here kana kuti denga ravakagadzira
79_29: Husiku hwaro vakaufukidza nerima uye vakaburitsamo chiedza
79_30: Uye mushure mezvo ndokubva vawaridza nyika
79_33: (Kuitira kuti) mubatsirikane nekudya kwenyu nemombe dzenyu
79_34: Asi kana kukauya dambudziko guru (zuva rekutongwa)
79_36: Uye moto weGehena uchava pachena kune (wese) anoona
79_37: Kune uyo aityora mitemo yese (nekusatenda nekusateerera Allah)
79_38: Uye akasarudza upenyu hwepasi pano (achiita zvido zvake)
79_40: Asi uyo aitya kumira pamberi paTenzi vake, uye akazvidzora kubva kuhuipi hwakasviba uye nemakaro
79_42: Vanokubvunza (Muhammad (SAW)) pamusoro penguva yekutongwa, kuti zuva racho ndirinhi
79_43: Hauna ruzivo kutaura chimwe chinhu pamusoro payo
79_44: Kuna Tenzi vako ndiko kune ruzivo rwenguva yacho
79_45: Zvirokwazvo iwe (Muhammad (SAW)) uri muyambiri kune avo vanoritya
79_46: Zuva ravachaiona kuchava sekunge havana kugara (pano panyika) kusiya kwemasikati kana mangwanani
80_2: Apo bofu (Abdullah Ibn Umm Maktoom) rakanga rauya kwaari (Muhammad (SAW) achiparidzira mukuru kana vakuru vemaQuraish
80_3: Uye unoziva sei pamwe anogona kuzvichenura (kubva kuzvitadzo)
80_4: Kana kuti anogona kuyeuka, uyezve yeuchidzo yobva yamubatsira
80_7: Hapana mhosva kwauri kana iye asina kuzvichenura (kubva mukusatenda)
80_8: Asi kune uyo anouya kwauri achimhanya (nechido)
80_19: Kubva kuNutfah (Mvura yemurume nemukadzi) vakamusika uye vakanyatsomugadzira zvakanaka
80_20: Uye vanomuitira kuti nzira imuitire nyore
80_21: Uye vanomuita kuti afe uye vomuisa muguva
80_24: Naizvozvo rega munhu atarise chikafu chake
80_27: Uye tinoita kuti zvirimwa zvikure imomo
80_33: Uye apo zuva rekutongwa parichauya (Hwamanda paicharidzwa kechipiri)
80_34: Zuva iri murume achatiza mukoma wake
80_37: Munhu wese zuva iri achange anezvinomukwanira zvichamuita kuti ashaye hanya nevamwe
80_38: Zvimwe zviso zuva iroro zvichave zvakajeka (vatendi vechokwadi muIslaam)
80_40: Uye zvimwe zviso zuva iroro zvichange zvakasuwa
80_42: Ava vanhu vange vasingatendi (kunaAllah) uye vachiita mabasa akaipa
81_1: Apo zuva parichaputirwa, uye chiedza charo chobva
81_3: Uye apo makomo paachaitwa kuti afambe (achibva panzvimbo dzawo)
81_4: Uye apo ngamera dzakazvitakura dzichasiiwa dzisina muchengeti
81_6: Uye apo makungwa paachatungidzwa ova moto (kana paachapfachukira)
81_7: Uye apo mweya ichabatanidzwa nemitumbi yayo (yakanaka neyakanaka uye yakaipa neyakaipa)
81_8: Uye apo mwanasikana akavigwa ari mupenyu (sezvaiitwa nemaArabhu vasati vave maMuslim) paachabvunzwa
81_10: Uye apo mabhuku (emabasa akanaka neakaipa) achavhurwa
81_11: Uye denga richasiiwa pachena robviswa panzvimbo paro
81_14: Munhu wese achaziva zvaakatungamidza (mabasa akanaka neakaipa)
81_15: Naizvozvo, ndinopika nepasi pose panotaramuka (zvisikwa zvomudenga zvinonyangarika masikati zvobudikira usiku)
81_16: Uyezve (ndinopika) nepasi pose panofamba nekukurumidza nekuzvihwandisa
81_19: Zvirokwazvo, iri (Qur’aan) ishoko (rakaunzwa) nemutumwa anoremekedzeka (Gabriel, kubva kuna Allah richienda kuna Mutumwa Muhammad (SAW)
81_23: Uye zvirokwazvo iye (Muhammad (SAW)) akamuona (Jibreel – Gabriel (AS)) mudenga makachena (kumabhazuva)
81_25: Uye iri (Qur’aan) harisi shoko raShaitwaan (satani) akarasirirwa
81_27: Zvirokwazvo, harisi chimwe chinhu kunze kweyeuchidzo kunyika dzose (Vanhu nemaJinn)
81_28: Kune wese kwamuri anoshuvira kutora nzira yakatwasuka
81_29: Uye hapana chamunoshuvira kusara kweizvo zvinoshuvirwa naAllah, Tenzi venyika dzose
82_4: Uye apo makuva paachashandurwa (achiburitsa zvinenge zviri maari)
82_5: (Ipapo) Munhu achaziva zvaakaita uye zvaakasiya (zvaasina kuita)
82_6: Iwe munhu! Chii chakuita kuti ushaye hanya nezvaTenzi vako, vanoremekedzwa
82_7: Avo vakakusika, vakakupa chimiro chakanaka, uye vakakupa zvakaenzanirana
82_8: Mune ipi nzira yavaida, vakakuisa (vakakuunza) pamwechete
82_10: Uye zvirokwazvo pamusoro penyu (pane ngirozi dzakasarudzwa) kuti dzikutarisei
82_14: Uye zvirokwazvo, Al-Fujjaar (vatadzi) vachava mumoto unopisa
82_15: Vachapindamo, voravira marimi awo (moto) anopisa pazuva rekutongwa
82_17: Uye chii chichaita kuti uzive chinonzi zuva rekutongwa
82_18: Zvakare, chii chichaita kuti uzive zuva rekutongwa
82_19: Zuva iro hapana munhu achange aine simba rekuiitira mumwe chii zvacho, uye mutongo, zuva iroro uchange uina Allah
83_1: Matambudziko kune Al-Mutwaffifoon (avo vanobiridzira, vanopa zvishoma pakuera nepauremu)
83_2: Avo kana vachitambira mupimo kubva kuvanhu vanoda mupimo wakazara
83_3: Uye kana vachipa nemupimo kana huremu kune (vamwe) vanhu vanopa zvishoma
83_6: Zuva iro vanhu vachamira pamberi paTenzi vepasi rose
83_7: Kwete! Zvirokwazvo, zvinyorwa zvemabasa evatadzi zviri muSijjeen
83_8: Uye chii chinoita kuti uzive kuti Sijjeen chii
83_10: Matambudziko pazuva iroro kune avo vanoramba
83_12: Uye hapana anoriramba kusara kweuyo anopfurikidza miganhu (pakusatenda, pakudzvinyirira uye pakusateerera Allah), mutadzi
83_13: Kana ndima dzedu dzichiverengwa kwaari anoti: “Inyaya dzevanhu vakare!”
83_14: Kwete! Asi pamoyo yavo pane Raan (chivharo chezvitadzo nemabasa akaipa) avaiwana
83_15: Kwete! Zvirokwazvo, (vatadzi) vachavharidzirwa kuona Tenzi vavo pazuva iroro
83_16: Uye zvirokwazvo vachava vanopinda murima remoto weGehena
83_18: Kwete! Zvirokwazvo, zvinyorwa zvemabasa evatendi zviri muIlliyyoon
83_19: Uye chii chinoita kuti uzive kuti Illiyyoon chii
83_26: Kwekupedzisira kwayo (waini) kuchange kuine munhuwi weMasiki (wakanaka)
83_28: Chitubu, chichange chichinwirwa nevari pedyo naAllah
83_29: Zvirokwazvo, (panyika) avo vaiita mabasa akaipa vaiseka avo vaitenda
83_31: Uye pose pavaidzokera kuvanhu vavo, vaidzoka vachiseka vachifara
83_32: Uye pavaivaona vaiti: “Zvirokwazvo, ava ndivo vakarasika!”
83_33: Asi avo (vasingatendi, vatadzi) havana kutumwa sevachengetedzi (vevanotenda)
83_34: Asi zuva ranhasi (zuva rekutongwa) avo vanotenda vachange vachiseka vasingatendi
83_36: Ko vasingatendi havana here kupihwa mubairo wavo (zvizere) wezvavaiita
84_2: Uye roteerera Tenzi waro – uye rinofanira kudaro
84_4: Uye parichabuditsa zvose zvaiva mariri rosara risina chinhu
84_5: Uye roteerera Tenzi waro - uye rinofanira kudaro
84_6: Iwe munhu! Zvirokwazvo, uchadzokera kuna Tenzi vako nemabasa ako (akanaka neakaipa) kudzokera kwechokwadi, uye uchasangana nawo (mabasa awaiita)
84_7: Kune uyo achapihwa gwaro (bhuku) rake kuruoko rwake rwekurudyi
84_9: Uye achadzokera kumhuri yake aine mufaro
84_10: Asi uyo achapihwa gwaro rake nekumashure kwake
84_13: Zvirokwazvo, aiva pakati pevanhu vake aine mufaro
84_19: Muchava munofamba kubva kune chimwe chikamu kuenda kune chimwe chikamu (paupenyu hwepano pasi nehwuchatevera)
84_21: Uye kana Qur’aan richiverengwa kwavari, havaisi zviso zvavo pasi
84_22: Asi, avo vasingatendi vanoramba (Muhammad (SAW) nezvose zvaakauya nazvo, Qur’aan iri nekutenda muhumwechete waAllah
84_23: Uye Allah vanoziva zvikuru zvavanounganidza (zvakanaka nezvakaipa)
84_25: Kusara kweavo vanotenda vachiita mabasa akanaka, vachava nemugoveusingazombofa wakasvika kumagumo (Paradhiso)
85_3: Uye nechinopupura (zuva rechishanu) uye chinopupurirwa (musi weArafah mumwedzi we Dhul- Hijjah)
85_4: Vakatukwa (vakarengerwa) vanhu veAl-Ukhdood (Gomba) (Panyaya yemukomana na mambo)
85_7: Uye vakapupura izvo zvavaiita vakanangana nevatendi (kuvapisa)
85_8: Uye vakange vasina mhosva kusara kwekuti vakatenda muna Allah, mukuru wazvose, vane kurumbidzwa kwose
85_9: Avo vane humambo hwekudenga nepasi! Uye Allah mupupuri wezvose
85_10: Zvirokwazvo, avo vanoedza vanhurume nevanhukadzi vanotenda (nokuvarwadzisa nekuvapisa), uye voregerera kukumbira ruregerero (kuna Allah), vachave nemutongo weGehena, uye vachave nomutongo wemoto unopisa
85_11: Zvirokwazvo, avo vanotenda nokuita mabasa akanaka, vachave neminda iyo nzizi dzichange dzichierera muzasi mayo (Paradhiso). Uku ndiko kubudirira kukuru
85_12: Zvirokwazvo, (Iwe Muhammad (SAW)) mutongo waTenzi vako wakaomarara
85_13: Zvirokwazvo, ndivo vanotanga (mutongo) uye vanodzokorora (mutongo pazuva rekutongwa). (Kana kuti ndivo vanotanga kusika zvinhu zvese, uye vachadzokorora kusika pazuva rekutongwa)
85_14: Uye ndivo muregereri, vane rudo rwose (kune vatsvene vanotenda muIslaam)
85_19: Asi, avo vasingatendi vakashingirira mukuramba (Muhammad (SAW) neshoko rake reIslaam
85_20: Uye Allah vanovakomberedza kubva kumashure kwavo (Allah vanoziva mabasa avo ese uye vachavapa mubhadharo wavo)
86_2: Uye chii chichakuita kuti uzive kuti At-Twaariq chii
86_4: Munhu wose ane muchengetedzi pamusoro pake (ngirozi dzinoona kumuchengetedza, kunyora mabasa ake akanaka neakaipa).nezvemunhu wose
86_5: Naizvozvo munhu ngaatarise kuti akasikwa kubva pai
86_9: Zuva	zvakavanzika	(mabasa,	minamato,	kutsanya,	nezvimwewo)	zvichaongororwa (zvichaburitswa)
86_10: Naizvozvo achange asina simba kana mubatsiri
86_11: (Ndinopika) nedenga (rine makore emvura) rinopa mvura, nguva nenguva
86_13: Zvirokwazvo, (Qur’aan) iri ishoko rinopatsanura (chokwadi kubva kumanyepo)
87_3: Uye avo vakaronga (mafambiro ezvinhu zvese), uye vakatungamira (vakaratidza vanhu nzira yakanaka kubva kune yakaipa, uye vakaratidza mhuka mafuro adzo)
87_5: Uye vomaita (mafuro) kuti aome, oita ruvara rwakasvibira
87_7: Kunze kweizvo Allah zvavanoda. Zvirokwazvo, (Allah) vanoziva zviri pachena nezvakavanzika
87_8: Uye tichakurerutsira nzira iri nyore (kuita mabasa akanaka)
87_13: Zvakare imomo haazombofi (kuti azorore) kana kurarama (hupenyu hwakanaka)
87_14: Zvirokwazvo uyo anozvichenesa (kubva mukusatenda uye otambira Islaam) achava anobudirira
87_15: Uye achirangarira zita raTenzi vake, uye achinamata (kashanu pazuva uye achiita minamato isina kukomekedzwa)
87_17: Kunyangwe upenyu uchatevera uri nani uye haugumi
88_1: Ko mashoko ezuva remukomberedzo (rekutongwa) akasvika kwauri here
88_2: Zvimwe zviso pazuva iroro zvichadupukiswa (mumoto, zviso zvevasingatendi)
88_3: Kusevenza (zvakanyanya muhupenyu hwepano pasi nekunamata zvimwe kunze kwaAllah), kunetseka (muhupenyu hwamangwa nekushorwa)

88_9: Vachifadzwa nemabasa avo (akanaka nekutenda kwavo muIslaam)
88_13: Mariri (bindu) muchange muine mibhedha yakareba (zvigaro zvakasimudzwa zviri pamusoro)
88_22: Hausi muchengetedzi wavo (Hauna masimba pamusoro pavo)
88_23: Kusara kweuyo anopikisa uye osiya kutenda
88_25: Zvirokwazvo, kwatiri ndiko kune kudzokera kwavo
88_26: Uye zvirokwazvo, kwatiri ndiko kune kutongwa kwavo
89_2: Neusiku gumi (mazuva gumi ekutanga kwemwedzi weDhul-Hijjah)
89_3: Uye nezvinhu zvinofambidzana muuviri uye zvakapfunda
89_5: Zvirokwazvo mazviri mune humboo kuvanhu vanonzwisisa
89_6: Hauoni here (Iwe Muhammad (SAW)) kuti Tenzi vako vakaita sei nemaAad
89_9: Uye maThamood, avo vaiveza matombo mumupata (vachigadzira dzimba)
89_12: Uye vachikonzera nyonga nyonga zvakanyanya mairi (nyika)
89_13: Naizvozvo Tenzi vako vakaisa pavari (vanhu) mitongo yakasiyana siyana yakaoma
89_15: Kana munhu, Tenzi vake kana vachinge vamuedza nekumupa chiremera nemakomborero, ipapo anobva ati: “Tenzi vangu vandipa chiremera!”
89_16: Asi kana (Allah) vakamuedza nekushomesa (kutambura) raramo yake anoti: “Tenzi vangu vandidzikisira!”
89_17: Kwete! Asi hamubati nherera zvakanaka (uye hamudzipi nhaka yadzo yakakwana)
89_21: Kwete! Apo nyika paichakuiwa kuita huruva
89_22: Uye Tenzi vako vouya nengirozi dziri mumitsara
89_23: Uye Gehena richaunzwa pedyo musi uyu. Pazuva iroro munhu acharangarira, asi kurangarira (kwake) kuchamubatsirei
89_24: Achati: “Matambudziko kwandiri! Dai ndakatungamidza (mabasa akanaka) paupenyu hwangu!”
89_25: Saka pazuva iri hapana achatonga sematongero avachaita (Allah)
89_26: Uye hapana achasunga (vasingatendi nevaiti vemabasa akashata) semasungiro avo (Allah)
89_28: Dzoka kunaTenzi vako, uchifadzwa (navo) uye vachifadzwa newe
90_2: Uyezve hauna mhosva neguta iri (Wakasununguka muGuta iri)
90_11: Asi haana kumboedza kupfuura nenzira yakatevenuka (yakareruka)
90_12: Uye chii chichakuita kuti uzive kuti nzira yakatevenuka chii
90_16: Kana kune murombo akarara muvhu (nokuda kweurombo)
90_17: Uye akazove umwe weavo vanotenda (muIslaam), uye vakakomekedzana kutsungirira, uye vakakomekedzana kunzwira tsitsi
90_19: Asi avo vasina kutenda muzviratidzo zvedu, ndeavo veruoko rweruboshwe (vanhu vekumoto)
90_20: Vachave vanovharirwa nemoto (Moto uchavakomberedza kubva kumativi ese)
91_8: Uye vakamuratidza zvakaipa kwaari nezvakanaka kwaari
91_10: Uye zvirokwazvo anokundikana uyo anozvikanganisira pachake (anoramba Islaam)
91_11: (Vanhu) veThamud vakaramba kuburikidza nekudarikidza kwavo mitemo (vairamba chitendero chechokwadi, Islaam, uye vachiita mabasa akaipa)
91_12: Apo muipi wavo akaenda mberi (kuti auraye ngamera)
91_13: Asi mutumwa waAllah (Swaalih (AS)) akati kwavari: “Iyi ingamera yaAllah (musaikuvadze), uye (musairambidze) kunwa kwayo!”
91_14: Naizvozvo vakamuramba uye vakaiuraya. Naizvozvo Tenzi vavo vakavaparadza nekuda kwechitadzo chavo, uye vakavaenzanisa mukuparadzwa (vanhu vose, vapfumi, nevarombo, vane simba nevasina simba)
91_15: Uye ivo (Allah) havana kutya zvichaitika mumashure mazvo
92_4: Zvirokwazvo, simba nemabasa enyu akasiyana siyana
92_5: Kune uyo anopa (zvipo) uye achitya Allah
92_6: Uye achitenda mune zvakanaka (Laa ilaaha illallaah – Hakuna ane kodzero yokunamatwa kunze kwaAllah; kana kuti mubairo kubva kuna Allah)
92_8: Asi uyo asingapi (anonyima), uye achifunga kuti mupfumi (haana chaanoda kubva kune umwe munhu)
92_9: Uye achiramba Al-Husna (zvakanaka: Laa ilaaha illallaah, kana kuti mubairo kubva kunaAllah)
92_11: Uye hupfumi hwake huchamubatsira chii paachawira pasi (mumatambudziko)
92_13: Uye zvirokwazvo kwatiri ndiko kune magumo nemavambo (upenyu hwepano pasi neuchatevera)
92_15: Hapana achaupinda kunze kweavo vachange vasina mufaro
92_17: Uye Al-Muttaqoon (vatsvene, vanhu vanotya Allah) vachaiswa kure nawo (moto weGehena)
92_18: Uye anopa hupfumi hwake kuti azvichenese
92_19: Uye uyo asiri kuripa chakanaka chaakaitirwa naani zvake
92_20: Kunze kwekuti achitsvaga chiso (kufadza) chaTenzi vake vepamusoro-soro
92_21: Uye zvirokwazvo mushure maizvozvo, achava anofara (paachapinda Paradhiso)
93_3: Tenzi vako (Iwe Muhammad (SAW)) havana kukurasirira kana kukuvenga
93_4: Uye zvirokwazvo hupenyu hwemangwana hwakanaka kwauri kukunda hupenyu hwenyika ino
93_5: Uye zvirokwazvo, Tenzi vako vachakupa (zvakanaka) naizvozvo ugofara
93_6: Havana here kukuwana (Muhammad (SAW)) uri nherera ndokubva vakuchengetedza
93_8: Uye vakakuwana uri murombo ndokubva vakuita mupfumi (mugutsikani nezvaunazvo)
93_11: Uyezve taura pamusoro pemakomborero aTenzi vako (awakapiwa, Huporofita nemamwewo)
94_1: Hatina here kukuvhura chipfuva chako (Iwe Muhammad (SAW)
94_2: Uye tikabvisa kubva kwauri misengwa yako
94_3: Iyo yairemera musana wako (yaidzikisira chimiro chako)
94_7: Naizvozvo kana wapedza (basa rako), zvipire (kuna Allah uchivanamata)
94_8: Uye kuna Tenzi vako zvipire nekuvimba kwako kwose
95_4: Zvirokwazvo, takasika munhu ane chimiro chakanaka
95_6: Kusara kweavo vanotenda (muIslaam) uye vachiita mabasa akanaka. Vachawana mubairo usingaperi (Paradhiso)
95_7: Nokudaro chii chinoita (iwe asingatendi) kuti urambe zuva rekutongwa
95_8: Havasi here Allah mutongi vanoziva pamusoro pevatongi vose
96_1: Verenga! Muzita raTenzi vako avo vakasika (zvinhu zvese)
96_3: Verenga! Uye Tenzi vako ndivo mukomboreri mukuru
96_8: Zvirokazvo, kuna Tenzi vako ndiko kune kudzokera
96_9: Wakamuona here (Muhammad (SAW)) uyo anodzivirira (anorambidza - Abu Jahl)
96_11: Wakamboona here kana iye (Muhammad (SAW)) ari kutungamirwa (naAllah)
96_13: Wakamboona here kana iye (Abu Jahl) achiramba chokwadi (Qur’aan) uye achifuratira
96_15: Asi, kana asina kusiya (Abu Jahl), tichamubata nebvudzi rekumberi
96_18: Isu tichadaidza vachengeti veGehena (kuti vaone chekuita naye)
96_19: Kwete! (Muhammad (SAW)) usamuteerera (Abu Jahl). Pfugama uye uswedere pedyo (naAllah)
97_2: Uye chii chichaita kuti uzive kuti usiku hwechisungo chii
97_3: Usiku hwechisungo huri nani kukunda churu chemwedzi (kunamata Allah mauri kuri nani kupfuura kunamata churu chemwedzi (makore makumi masere nematatu, nemwedzi mina)
97_4: Mauri munodzika ngirozi nemweya mutsvene (Gabriel) nemvumo yaTenzi vavo nezvisungo zvose
97_5: (Usiku hwese) Pane runyararo (uye zvakanaka kubva kuna Allah zvichienda kuvaranda vavo vanotenda) kusvikira nguva yemambakwedza
98_1: Avo vasingatendi kubva kuvanhu veBhuku (maJudha nemaKristu) nemaMushrikoon (avo vanonamata zvidori, kana kuti Allah vachivasanganisa nezvimwe zvinhu), vakanga vasingazosiyi (kusatenda) kusvikira humboo huri pachena hwauya kwavari
98_2: Mutumwa (Muhammad (SAW)) kubva kuna Allah, achiverenga bhuku rakachenurwa (Qur’aan rakachenurwa kubva kumanyepo)
98_3: Mariri mune mitemo yakatwasuka (kubva kuna Allah)
98_4: Uye vanhu veBhuku (maJudha nemaKristu) havana kusiyana asi mushure mokunge humboo hwakajeka hwauya kwavari
98_5: Uye havana kukomekedzwa asi kunamata Allah, uye kunamata Allah chete voga, uye kuita Swalaah (Munamato), uye kupa Zvipo (Zakaah), uye ichi ndicho chitendero chakatwasuka
98_6: Zvirokwazvo, avo vasingatendi kubva muvanhu veBhuku (maJudha nemaKristu) nemaMushrikoon (avo vanonamata zvidori, kana kuti Allah vachivasanganisa nezvimwe zvinhu) vachange vari mumoto weGehena vachigara imomo. Vanhu vakadaro ndivo zvisikwa zvakashata
98_7: Zvirokwazvo, avo vanotenda (muIslaam), uye vachiita mabasa akanaka, vanhu vakadaro ndivo zvisikwa zvakanaka
98_8: Mubairo wavo unaTenzi vavo, Paradhiso rine nzizi dzinoerera pasi paro.Vachagara imomo zvachose. Allah vachafadzwa navo uye ivo vachafadzwa navo (Allah). Izvi ndezve uyo anotya Tenzi vake
99_2: Uye kana nyika yoburitsa misengwa yayo (zvayakaviga)
99_3: Uye munhu achati: “Chii chiri kunetsa pairi?”
99_4: Nezuva iroro ichataura mashoko ayo (zvaiitika pamusoro payo zvakanaka nezvakaipa)
99_5: Nokuda kwekuti Tenzi vako vanenge vaiudza izvozvo
99_6: Nezuva iroro vanhu vachaenda muzvikwata kuitira kuti vagotaridzwa mabasa avo
99_7: Naizvozvo uyo anenge aita chakanaka chakafanana nehuremu hwekasvosve kamwechete achachiona
99_8: Uye uyo anenge aita chakaipa chakafanana nehuremu hwekasvosve kamwechete achachiona
100_7: Uye zvirokwazvo iye ichapupu kune izvozvo (nemabasa ake)
100_9: Haazivi here kuti apo zviri mumakuva zvichaburitswa
100_10: Uye izvo zviri muzvipfuva pazvichaitwa kuti zvizivikanwe
100_11: Zvirokwazvo, nezuva iroro Tenzi vavo vachange vachinyatsoziva nezvavo (mabasa avo uye vovapa mubairo wavo)
101_3: Uye chii chichakuita kuti uzive kuti nguva yokuparadzwa chii
101_4: Izuva iro vachange vakaita sokunge shave-shave dzakapararira
101_5: Uye makomo achaita sokunge shinda (wuru) yakaparadzirwa
101_6: Asi kune uyo huremu hwemabasa ake (akanaka) huchange huchirema
101_8: Asi kune uyo huremu hwemabasa ake achange asingaremi
101_9: Achawana imba yake iri Haawiya (gomba, Gehena)
101_10: Uye chii chichakuita kuti uzive kuti chii
102_5: Kwete! Dai maiziva noruzivo rwechokwadi (magumo ekuunganidza, maisadaro)
102_7: Uye zvakare, muchauona (iwo moto) nemeso akajeka
102_8: Uye nezuva iroro zvirokwazvo muchabvunzwa nezvemafaro (zvamaiita panyika)
103_3: Kusara kweavo vanotenda (muhumwechete hwaAllah), uye vachiita mabasa akanaka, uye vachikurudzirana chokwadi (kuita mabasa akanaka akatarwa naAllah nekusiya akaipa), uye vachikurudzirana kuva netariro (kutsungirira kubva kumatambudziko anovawana munzira yaAllah)
104_1: Matambudziko kune wese anonyepera vamwe uye anonyeya
104_3: Anofunga kuti hupfumi hwake huchamuita kuti agare nokusingaperi
104_5: Uye chii chichaita kuti uzive kuiti moto unoparadza chii
104_9: Mumitsigo yakatambanudzwa (kuti vacharangwa mumoto une mitsigo)
105_1: Hauna kuona (Iwe Muhammad (SAW)) here zvakaitwa naTenzi vako kuvaridzi venzou? (Mauto ane nzou akabva kuYemen achitungamirirwa na Abrahah Al-Ashram vane chinangwa chekuparadza Ka’bah kuMakkah)
105_2: Havana kuita here kuti hurongwa hwavo hurasike (hushaye basa)
105_5: Uye vakavaita sokunge munda (usina chunhu) wakadyiwa (nemombe)
106_1: (Mufaro mukuru kubva kuna Allah) nechengetedzo kumaQuraish
106_2: Kuchengetedzwa kwavo pakufamba (vachienda kunotengesa) munguva yechando nenguva yekupisa
106_3: Naizvozvo, ngavanamate (Allah) Tenzi ve imba iyi (Ka’bah ku Makkah)
106_4: Avo vanovapa chikafu kubva munzara, uye vanovachengetedza kubva mukutya
107_1: Wakambomuona here uyo anoramba zuva rekutongwa (rekuwana mubairo)
107_5: Avo vasingakoshesi (vano nonoka kuita) Swalaah (munamato kubva kunguva yayo yakatarwa)
107_6: Avo vanoita mabasa akanaka kuti vaonekwe
107_7: Uye vanonyima Al-Maa’uoon (rubatsiro diki nemunyu, shuga, mvura, nezvimwe zvakadaro)
108_2: Naizvozvo namata Tenzi vako uye vopira (kwavari chete)
108_3: Zvirokwazvo, uyo anokuvenga (Iwe Muhammad (SAW)) ndiye achaparadzwa
109_1: Iti (Iwe Muhammad (SAW)): “Imi vasingatendi (muna Allah, muhumwechete wavo, ngirozi dzavo, Mabhuku avo, vatumwa vavo, muzuva rekutongwa, uye kuti zvose zvinoitika nokuda kwavo (Allah)
109_6: Kwamuri mune chitendero chenyu, uye ini kwandiri ndine chitendero changu.”
110_2: Uye kana ukaona vanhu vachipinda vakawanda muchitendero chaAllah (Islaam)
110_3: Nokudaro kudza kurumbidzwa kwaTenzi vako, uye vakumbire ruregerero.Zvirokwazvo ndivo vanoregerera
111_1: Ngaaparadzwe maoko aAbu Lahab uye ngaaparadzwe
111_2: Upfumi hwake nevana vake hazvisi kana kuzomubetsera
111_3: Achapiswa mumoto uye une viriri rinobvira
111_4: Uye mukadzi wake achange akatakura huni
111_5: Muhuro make muchange muine tambo yemadheti yakakoswa yegavi nemurara
112_2: Allah vanodiwa nezvisikwa zvose (asi ivo hapana chavanoda)
112_3: Havabereki vana, kuti ivo havana kuberekwa
112_4: Hakuna mumwe akafanana navo kana kuti kuenzaniswa navo.”
113_1: Iti: “Ndinotsvaga chengetedzo muna (Allah), Tenzi vekubuda kwezuva (mangwanani)
113_3: Uye kubva kune zvakaipa zverima (usiku kana hwauya nerima)
113_4: Uye kubva mune zvakaipa zveavo vanoita huroi kana vachifuridza chishwe (funda)
113_5: Uye kubva kune zvakaipa zveuyo ane shanje kana achiita shanje.”
114_4: Kubva kuhuipi hwemuzevezeri (Satani anozevezera mumoyo yevanhu), uye obva (kubva mukuzevezera kwake mumoyo wemunhu mushure mokunge afunga Allah)
